programme.desc: Before his fifth year begins, Harry and his cousin are attacked by Dementors, forcing Harry to use magic outside of Hogwarts and therefore face the possibility of a trial and being expelled from the school. The Order of the Phoenix is founded.

programme.title: Movie: Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them
programme.desc: Newt Scamander reaches New York at the end of his journey researching magical creatures in 1926. When a muggle accidentally lets some of his creatures loose, Newt is forced to team up with an Auror to recapture the beasts amid rising tensions in the city.

programme.title: Movie: Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes of Grindelwald
programme.desc: True to his promise, the dark wizard Grindelwald escapes from custody while being transferred to Europe to answer for his crimes, and begins assembling followers who share his ambitions, but he's opposed by a young wizard with a love of magical beasts.

programme.title: Temptation Island: New Season First Look
programme.desc: A first look at the new season of USA's 'Temptation Island.'

programme.title: Modern Family: Did the Chicken Cross the Road?
programme.desc: When Cam forgets the words to his favourite country song, he blames Mitch and decides he needs to reconnect with his roots and get a chicken. Meanwhile, Alex is up for a prestigious government job that requires a family interview.

programme.title: Modern Family: Kids These Days
programme.desc: Haley needs a little motherly advice from Claire as she considers her future with Dylan and her career. Meanwhile, Jay and Cam’s less than politically correct coaching style earns them a class on sensitivity.

programme.title: Modern Family: Putting Down Roots
programme.desc: Dede's husband, Jerry, comes to town to bequeath her possessions to the family. Mitch and Claire receive a little more of Dede than they really know what to do with, Jay and Gloria feel sorry for Jerry and invite him to stay with them while he is in town.

programme.title: Modern Family: Stuck in a Moment
programme.desc: Hayley wants to give the family a Christmas gift they will never forget if she can just figure out the perfect time. Meanwhile, Claire is mad that Phil has once again borrowed the family Christmas tree for a house-showing.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Moving Day
programme.desc: Claire and Phil aren't convinced that Haley and Dylan can make it on their own as they move them into their new apartment before the baby arrives. Meanwhile, Pameron gets out of prison early and has a bone to pick with Mitchell.

programme.title: Modern Family: Blasts From the Past
programme.desc: Phil and Claire decide to take a cycling tour through Italy before they become grandparents, and Dylan introduces them to his mom who has an interesting past.

programme.title: Monk: Mr. Monk and the Game Show
programme.desc: Mr. Monk helps the father of his late wife solve a puzzling mystery on a game show.

programme.title: Monk: Mr. Monk Takes His Medicine
programme.desc: Monk's new medicine, prescribed to curb his OCD, impairs his crime-solving instincts.

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly House of Cards
programme.desc: An obsession with the TV show 'Dexter' turned into a search for a murderer.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Paper Soldiers
programme.desc: A widow is suspicious of the circumstances surrounding her marine husband's last battle and Sam and Callen help to determine if there has been a cover-up.

programme.desc: After Todd signs a development deal, he fuels a competition between Julie, Chase and Savannah to be the listing agent. Meanwhile, Grayson decides to help Todd get over his fear of snakes.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: America's Next Todd Model
programme.desc: Faye takes the law in to her own hands when the neighborhood kids annoy her. And Todd gets a second shot at becoming a male model.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Say It, Don't Spray It

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince
programme.desc: Harry Potter and Dumbledore embark on a dangerous journey to defeat Harry's evil enemy, Voldemort. Meanwhile, the rest of the gang probe into the identity of the mysterious Half-Blood Prince.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 1
programme.desc: While racing to destroy Horcruxes, Harry discovers the Deathly Hallows, the most powerful objects in the wizarding world.

programme.title: Family Guy: Emmy-Winning Episode
programme.desc: Tired of not winning an Emmy, Peter embarks on his own For Your Consideration campaign for Family Guy by making the show more like Emmy-winning shows and no category is off limits.

programme.title: Family Guy: Foxx in the Men House
programme.desc: Peter becomes friends with a cool, handsome paramedic named Stryker Foxx. Wrapped up in his newfound 'coolness,' he soon dumps Quagmire, Joe and Cleveland.

programme.title: Family Guy: Nanny Goats
programme.desc: The Griffins get a nanny for the kids, courtesy of Lois' parents, which gives Peter and Lois the opportunity to reconnect.

programme.title: Family Guy: Follow the Money
programme.desc: After Chris gets a special one-dollar bill for his birthday and quickly loses it, the dollar gets passed from character to character throughout Quahog.

programme.title: Family Guy: Three Directors
programme.desc: In a special anthology-style episode, Peter gets fired from his job at the brewery in the signature styles of three famous Hollywood film directors.

programme.title: Family Guy: The D in Apartment 23
programme.desc: When Brian posts an offensive tweet that goes viral and the rest of the Griffins are also treated as outcasts, he's forced to move out of the Griffin house.

programme.title: Family Guy: Petey IV
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving weekend, Peter discovers an alternate ending in the Russian version of one of his favorite films and writes to Vladimir Putin, who comes to Quahog. Meanwhile, a strapped-for-cash Brian gets a job at a suicide hotline center.

programme.title: Family Guy: Crimes and Meg's Demeanor
programme.desc: Peter encourages Meg to attend a high school party, where she takes up drinking, which both concerns and delights her father. Meanwhile, Brian begins spying on his neighbors and suspects Principal Shepherd of a crime.

programme.title: Family Guy: Don't Be a Dickens at Christmas
programme.desc: A selfish Peter loses his Christmas spirit and is visited by ghosts of Christmas past, present and future who take him on a journey around Quahog in the style of Charles Dickens' 'A Christmas Carol.'

programme.title: Family Guy: Boy (Dog) Meets Girl (Dog)
programme.desc: At the vet's office, Brian meets a female show dog named Ellie. Smitten with her, he enters a show dog competition, in which the winner gets to breed with her.

programme.title: Family Guy: Dog Bites Bear
programme.desc: Stewie and Brian get into a friendship-ending fight after Brian commits a terrible act to one of Stewie's beloved toys. Meanwhile, Peter refuses to wash his hand after meeting his favourite breakfast cereal mascot, Boo Berry.

programme.title: Family Guy: Send in Stewie, Please
programme.desc: Stewie gets sent to see his school's child psychologist, Dr. Cecil Pritchfield, for a surprising session, which causes Stewie to reveal major, never-before-told secrets about himself.

programme.title: Family Guy: V Is for Mystery
programme.desc: In a special Dickensian-themed episode, Stewie and Brian are detectives who embark on solving a string of mysterious murders set in Victorian-era London.

programme.title: Family Guy: Veteran Guy
programme.desc: After Peter and the guys get caught pretending to be military veterans and are found guilty of the Stolen Valor Act, a judge sentences them to join the U.S. Coast Guard.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A magazine program featuring current events as seen from a Christian perspective, as well as testimonies of changed lives.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Team Homer
programme.desc: Mr. Burns decides to join Homer's bowling team after becoming the sponsor. Bart's shirt leads to the implementation of uniforms at school, causing a loss of individuality and creativity.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Two Bad Neighbors
programme.desc: Homer's garage sale is upstaged by George Bush, who is moving in across the street. When Bart receives a spanking, Homer starts a prank war that escalates into a one-on-one confrontation.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Scenes From a Class Struggle in Springfield
programme.desc: While wearing an expensive suit found at an outlet mall, Marge meets a former schoolmate who invites her and the family to the country club. Marge soon becomes obsessed with trying to fit in with high society, while Homer takes up golf.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Fink
programme.desc: Bart inadvertently gets Krusty in trouble with the IRS by uncovering Krusty's tax-cheating ways. Soon after, Krusty is presumed dead when his plane crashes and a heartbroken Bart keeps thinking he sees Krusty in public.

programme.title: Movie: The Sorcerer's Apprentice
programme.desc: A master sorcerer recruits an average man to assist him on his mission to protect the world from his archrival.

programme.title: Movie: Alice in Wonderland
programme.desc: Alice returns to magical Underland, which she visited during her childhood. After reuniting with old friends the Mad Hatter and the White Queen, Alice learns of the Red Queen's reign of terror and discovers her destiny is to kill the Jabberwocky.

programme.title: Movie: Matilda
programme.desc: An intelligent young girl is sent away to a school with a mean principal and a very nice teacher. While there, Matilda develops her telekinetic powers and uses them to trick the mean adults in her life.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: In the future, the Capitol selects a boy and a girl from the twelve districts to fight to the death on television. Katniss volunteers to take her sister's place for the latest match.

programme.title: Bones: The Day in the Life
programme.desc: In the series's penultimate episode, each leading character's final story begins to unfold. Brennan testifies for Zach in trial, Angela reveals some big news, and Aubrey and Jessica come to terms about their future together.

programme.title: Bones: The Final Chapter: The End in the End
programme.desc: With Kovac still at large, the team searches for evidence to track him down. After Brennan experiences a setback, the rest of the team must figure out how to find Kovac without her.

programme.title: Bones: Pilot
programme.desc: Agent Booth asks Dr. Brennan to provide clues when skeletal remains are found in a lake.

programme.title: Bones: The Man in the SUV
programme.desc: A car bomb explodes in front of a café, killing the driver and a number of the patrons.

programme.title: Movie: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A morning talk show producer is appalled by the chauvinistic host that her boss has recently hired. The new host challenges all of her beliefs in relationships but she takes his advice when she finds herself in a new relationship.

programme.title: Movie: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A bounty hunter, who has suffered a string of bad luck, learns that his next target is his ex-wife, who jumped bail in order to follow a lead on a murder case.

programme.title: Movie: Fool's Gold
programme.desc: A married couple rekindle their marriage and romance on an adventure to find a treasure.

programme.title: Movie: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: A successful journalist is contacted by her estranged parents, reawakening memories of her unconventional childhood. Her family often moved from state to state, constantly fleeing unpaid bills and living under her father's crippling alcoholism.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Breaking Brig
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates the crash of an armoured transport bus carrying Naval brig detainees after four prisoners escape, including a black market broker who is one of the country's biggest security threats. Meanwhile, Pride turns to Gibbs for help.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: During the annual Louisiana Pirate Festival, the NCIS team investigates the murder of a navy captain who was searching for a valuable 200-year-old marble and gold fleur-de-lis.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Pride, Sebastian and Tammy travel to South America after Pride is personally requested by a former colleague to assist with a classified operation that has been compromised.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: High Stakes
programme.desc: Percy and Lasalle go undercover at a high-stakes underground poker game after the organizer targets players with access to a naval research library.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Powder Keg
programme.desc: Pride and his bar patrons, including Sydney Halliday who is visiting Pride after leaving the army, are held hostage by a group of volatile thieves.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Mind Games
programme.desc: Gregorio calls on Claire McGrady, her former behavioral science professor, when the team’s latest case matches one she studied during FBI training.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Assassination of Dwayne Pride
programme.desc: A journalist posts a scathing article about Pride's reckless behaviour and the team becomes worried about the fallout of the article and confidential information contained therein.

programme.title: Movie: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A morning talk show producer is appalled by the chauvinistic host that her boss has recently hired. The new host challenges all of her beliefs in relationships but she takes his advice when she finds herself in a new relationship.

programme.title: Movie: Ghosts of Girlfriends Past
programme.desc: A bachelor is living his dream of being a big city photographer, taking pictures of beautiful women. He dates many women for brief periods of time and leaves them. At his brother's wedding, ghosts of his exes visit him to show him the error of his ways.

programme.title: Movie: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: An amnesiac is rescued at sea by the crew of an Italian fishing boat. Nearly dead, he carries nothing but the bullets in his back and the bank account number embedded in his hip. He must try to piece together his mysterious past while eluding assassins.

programme.title: Movie: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: A former CIA assassin from an experimental top-secret program resorts to his training when he is framed for a botched CIA operation.

programme.title: Movie: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: As government agents continue to track him down, Jason Bourne searches for his identity by going back to where his journey all began.

programme.title: Movie: Star Trek
programme.desc: A Romulan, Nero, travels through time searching for Ambassador Spock. Romulus is destroyed in the future and Nero holds Spock responsible. His vengeance brings him to the time of Kirk and Spock's youth where they are still in Starfleet Academy.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead: Wrath
programme.desc: Travis is blindsided by new refugees at the hotel. Meanwhile, Nick must make the decision to leave the Colonia or stay with Luciana.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead: North
programme.desc: Travis' rage causes unrest at the RBH. Madison must decide if she will stand by Travis. Nick takes on leadership of the Colonia as Narcos close in.

programme.title: The Three Stooges: You Natzy Spy!
programme.desc: Three politicians from a small country discover there is no money in peace.

programme.title: Movie: Lord of War
programme.desc: An arms dealer struggles with the morality of his work while Interpol chases him down.

programme.title: Movie: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: A cover-up is revealed after two young marines are accused of murdering a member of their platoon on a U.S. Naval base.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Large Birds, Spiders and Mom
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan ignorantly try to prepare Jake for his first day of junior high, but may wind up traumatizing him instead.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Media Room Slash Dungeon
programme.desc: Charlie reacts oddly after an evening with his mother, and Alan's date reacts oddly after having sex with him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Dum Diddy Dum Diddy Doo
programme.desc: Suffering from 'bimbo fatigue,' Charlie lets Alan set him up with a woman his own age.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: City of Great Racks
programme.desc: Charlie gets closer to consummating his relationship with Linda, but then he begins to see Rose's face everywhere he turns.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Putting Swim Fins on a Cat
programme.desc: Charlie has to find creative ways to entertain his girlfriend's four-year-old son while Alan becomes a human guinea pig.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Help Daddy Find His Toenail
programme.desc: Charlie's girlfriend is embarrassed to be seen with him in public. Meanwhile, Jake sneaks out to a concert despite Alan's forbiddance.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Leather Gear Is in the Guest Room
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan butt heads over Alan's place in the house, prompting Alan and Jake to move in with Evelyn.

programme.desc: Charlie tries to resist his strong attraction to his soon-to-be stepsister.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Kinda Like Necrophilia

programme.title: Movie: Boo! A Madea Halloween
programme.desc: Madea and her friends are asked to watch her great-niece on Halloween. As the night goes on they are plagued by supernatural events. Madea has to keep the teens out of trouble while fending off a number of paranormal threats like ghosts and zombies.

programme.title: Movie: A Brush With Love
programme.desc: As she considers giving up on her artistic dreams, Jamie paints a vision board that brings her success and love - only to discover that the mystery man in her painting isn't who she thinks.

programme.title: Movie: Anything for Love
programme.desc: Katherine believes men are intimidated by her career, creates an internet dating profile claiming she is an executive assistant rather than a high-powered executive.

programme.title: Movie: A Dash of Love
programme.desc: When an aspiring chef lands an assistant job at her idol's restaurant, she's convinced her big break is just around the corner. After a rocky start, she befriends the handsome executive chef and they bond in the kitchen.

programme.title: Movie: A Little Christmas Charm
programme.desc: When a woman finds a lost charm bracelet she sets out to find the rightful owner. Along the way she teams up with an investigative reporter to ensure her mission is complete before Christmas Eve.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Piece of Cake
programme.desc: While preparing for a friend's birthday party, the girls recall past birthdays, including Rose's surprise birthday party for Dorothy, a surprise birthday party for Blanche and a memory of Sophia's birthday involving her late-husband Sal.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Empty Nests
programme.desc: Renee is feeling depressed and lonely with her children grown up and moved out and her husband's workaholic habits.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Friends
programme.desc: Dorothy learns that Sophia's new friend is suffering from Alzheimer's disease.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One for the Money
programme.desc: Dorothy and Sophia flashback to their purchase of the family's first television in 1954.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Bringing Up Baby
programme.desc: Rose inherits her late uncle's estate, provided she takes care of his prized pig 'Baby.'

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Housekeeper
programme.desc: The girls hire a new housekeeper and she puts a curse on their house.

programme.title: Frasier: Three Blind Dates
programme.desc: Frasier's family and friends set him up with women who will sweep him off his feet.

programme.title: Frasier: War of the Words
programme.desc: Frasier smells T-R-O-U-B-L-E when son Frederick nears the spelling bee championship crown.

programme.title: Frasier: Deathtrap
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles revisit their childhood home and discover a skull in their secret place.

programme.title: Frasier: The Love You Fake
programme.desc: Martin trumps Frasier by 'dating' a rival neighbour's mother, and Niles gets a Segway.

programme.title: Frasier: Cheerful Goodbyes
programme.desc: Frasier heads to Boston on a business trip and reunites with the old Cheers gang.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Has Spokane
programme.desc: Frasier is excited about his show going to Spokane, until he arrives for the broadcast.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nothing to Fear But Fear Itself
programme.desc: Dorothy and Blanche accompany Rose to her aunt's funeral where she must give the eulogy.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Letter to Gorbachev
programme.desc: Rose writes to Soviet leader Gorbachev and receives an invitation to Moscow.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Strange Bedfellows
programme.desc: Blanche is exposed in the newspaper entering the home of a local married politician.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: Blanche makes a move at Ted, Stan's brother, the minute she learns he's a neurosurgeon. She is furious when she discovers the only woman Ted is apparently interested in is Dorothy. Meanwhile, Rose is suffering from insomnia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Visit From Little Sven
programme.desc: Rose's cousin Sven, arrives in Miami for a visit just prior to him being married by arrangement. However, when Blanche plays a trick on her latest beau, which involves Sven, the naive groom falls for her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Audit
programme.desc: Dorothy is stunned to learn that Stan's tax problems are her tax problems since Stan is being audited for a number of years when they were still married. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose take a Spanish class, each for different reasons.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Three on a Couch
programme.desc: Constant bickering causes the girls to seek help from a therapist. This prompts the girls to reminisce about times they didn't get along. The therapist's conclusion: they should not live with one another.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Charlie's Buddy
programme.desc: A wartime buddy of Rose's late husband arrives in Miami to see Rose. However, he has more in mind than just a friendly visit. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Blanche haggle over the same dress to wear to a social event.

programme.title: Movie: My Summer Prince
programme.desc: When a prince finds himself in some hot water for his partying ways, the royal family hires a PR consultant. But when she falls ill, her assistant steps in to take control of the campaign and possibly the prince's heart.

programme.title: Movie: Sweet Autumn
programme.desc: A woman divides up her candy shop between her niece, and a maple farmer. Neither know her true intentions until they attend the Sweet Autumn Festival in town.

programme.title: Movie: Bottled With Love
programme.desc: After being stood up, Abbey gets inspired to open her heart in a letter, put it in a bottle and toss it out to sea. Months later, a man fishing discovers it and opts to reach out.

programme.title: Movie: My Secret Valentine
programme.desc: A young woman takes advice from the chalkboard notes that her mysterious house rental tenant leaves when a slick sales rep arrives with plans to buy her family prized winery.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: A filthy-rich family suddenly finds themselves broke and are forced to move to a small, depressing town called Schitt's Creek, a town they once bought as a joke.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Town for Sale
programme.desc: Johnny finds a potential buyer for the town. David and Alexis discover they may have become more attached to the town than they ever thought possible.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Finding David
programme.desc: The Roses search for their missing son, David, while Alexis takes her relationship with Mutt to the next level despite technically being engaged to Ted.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Family Dinner
programme.desc: Moira decides to cook dinner with the help of David. Johnny scopes out an office for his consulting business. And Alexis finally comes clean with Ted about their engagement.

programme.title: The Office: Double Date
programme.desc: Jim and Pam have no choice but to go out with Michael and Helene, as their excuses have dried up. Dwight does nice things for the people in the office.

programme.title: The Office: Murder
programme.desc: Michael is troubled by rumours about Dunder Mifflin, and forces the office into a day of strange diversions. Andy figures out that the chief obstacle he has to overcome is his own awkwardness.

programme.title: The Office: Share Holders Meeting
programme.desc: When Michael learns he is going to be honoured at the Dunder Mifflin shareholder meeting in New York City, he brings Andy, Dwight and Oscar with him. Jim is left in charge of the office, and has a hard time getting Ryan to do any work.

programme.title: The Office: Scott's Tots
programme.desc: Michael has to face the music when he realizes he cannot keep a promise he made to a group of kids 10 years earlier.

programme.title: Kevin Hart's Guide to Black History
programme.desc: Kevin Hart teaches his daughter and her friend about the accomplishments of Black visionaries in America including Henry Box Brown, Robert Smalls, Mae Jemison, Josephine Baker and more.

programme.title: Movie: Get Hard
programme.desc: When a millionaire is convicted of fraud, he's given 30 days to get his affairs in order before doing time in San Quentin. Terrified of what prison life has in store for him, he hires his black friend to prep him for the experience.

programme.title: South Park: Professor Chaos
programme.desc: When the boys fire Butters as their new friend, devastation over his rejection unleashes his dark side and the super villain Professor Chaos is born.

programme.title: South Park: Simpsons Already Did It
programme.desc: Professor Chaos is frustrated when he realizes all of his diabolical plans to wreak havoc on South Park have already been done by 'The Simpsons.' Meanwhile, Cartman and the boys try to retrieve their sea-men from Ms. Choksondik's stomach.

programme.title: South Park: Fourth Grade
programme.desc: Fearing their new teacher, Miss Choksondik, the kids build a time machine from Timmy's electronic wheelchair to travel back in time to the glory days of the third grade.

programme.title: South Park: Wing
programme.desc: The boys set up the 'Awesome Talent Agency' and pool all their resources to impress their first client only to have an agency run by the Chinese Mafia steal her away.

programme.title: South Park: Clubhouses
programme.desc: Stan and Kyle are psyched to have Wendy and Bebe visit their clubhouse for a game of 'Truth or Dare,' but first they have to build one. When they won't let Carman join, he and Kenny build their own clubhouse and invite teenage girls to play with them.

programme.title: South Park: Quest for Ratings
programme.desc: The boys of South Park produce their own morning news show on the school's closed-circuit television station and are immediately caught up in an intense competition for ratings.

programme.title: South Park: Fat Butt and Pancake Head
programme.desc: One of Cartman's body parts becomes famous overnight and rivals the popularity of another superstar.

programme.title: South Park: Spontaneous Combustion
programme.desc: When the citizens of South Park start exploding randomly, the mayor enlists Stan's dad, the resident geologist, and the town's only scientists, to find a solution to the problem.

programme.title: South Park: The Mexican Staring Frog of Southern Sri Lanka
programme.desc: Jimbo and Ned's efforts to drive up the ratings for their new hunting show on the cable access channel threatens to edge out an old favourite, 'Jesus and Pals.'

programme.title: South Park: About Last Night...
programme.desc: While the country celebrates the outcome of the election, the new President-elect catches everyone off guard when he arrives at the White House prematurely.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Prom

programme.title: The Office: The Banker
programme.desc: When a potential buyer comes to Dunder Mifflin, Michael, Dwight, Andy and Pam pull out all the stops in the hopes of impressing him with their high profile contacts. Michael reminisces about all the great times they have had in the office.

programme.title: The Office: Sabre

programme.title: The Office: The Manager and the Salesman

programme.title: The Office: The Delivery
programme.desc: Pam's contractions begin but she and Jim are determined to wait it out as long as possible so they can have more time at the hospital. The office tries to distract Pam from the pain by entertaining her.

programme.title: The Office: The Delivery
programme.desc: Pam and Jim make a blunder after their baby's birth; Michael sets up Erin with Kevin.

programme.title: The Office: St. Patrick's Day
programme.desc: Michael thinks he has impressed Jo, only to learn that someone else in the office has caught her eye.

programme.title: The Office: New Leads
programme.desc: When the sales staff lets Sabre's new 'sales is king' policy get to their heads, Michael hides their new, prized leads.

programme.title: The Office: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Michael gets kicked out of a bar while trying to impress one of Jim's friends.

programme.title: The Office: Secretary's Day
programme.desc: Andy pulls out all the stops to give Erin a memorable Secretary's Day, and Michael reluctantly agrees to take her out to lunch. While out, Michael accidentally reveals a secret about Andy and Angela's relationship.

programme.title: Movie: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: The Anti-Villain League has recruited Gru to help deal with a powerful new super criminal.

programme.title: Movie: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: When Shrek is burdened with a mid-life crisis, Rumpelstiltskin tricks him into allowing himself to be sent to an alternate world where Rumpel is the ruler.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Deadly Harvest
programme.desc: Jane and Maura are called out to the BCU 'body farm' (an academic research facility dedicated to the study of human decomposition) when a murder victim is found buried in a shallow grave among the research corpses.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Face Value
programme.desc: The good news is we have a witness to a murder. The bad news is he suffers from Prosopagnosia, commonly known as facial recognition blindness, and he can't recognize the killer. The Rizzolis prepare for a visit from their scheming cousin, Carlo.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: A Bad Seed Grows
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old girl is murdered and left in a cage, Jane and Maura must overcome the ethical dilemma of a psychiatrist and the stiff opposition of a fussy prosecutor to find the killer. Meanwhile, Jane has couch issues and Frankie sees UFOs.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Nice to Meet You, Dr. Isles
programme.desc: When the jeweler to Boston's super cool and famous dies, our investigation leads us to a member of the Isles family we've never met. And that leads us to a secret Maura has been keeping for almost all of her life.

programme.title: Little Women: Atlanta: A Little Extra: No Respect for the Queen
programme.desc: Monie makes her return to Atlanta looking for support and a place to stay, but Ms. Juicy has other ideas. When Abira feels slighted by the Twins, their long standing feud erupts into all out chaos, catching the rest of the girls in the crossfire.

programme.title: Movie: The Wendy Williams Story: What a Mess
programme.desc: Wendy Williams, the self-anointed Queen of all Media, sheds her private persona and speaks directly to the camera, discussing every inch of joy and humiliation she has experienced since childhood.

programme.title: Movie: Wendy Williams: The Movie
programme.desc: Talk show host Wendy Williams executive produces the biopic on her life, revealing the highs and lows she has experienced throughout the years.

programme.title: The Bobby Brown Story
programme.desc: Bobby Brown becomes one of the biggest entertainers in the world by the age of 20.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hack Attack
programme.desc: A successful and growing manufacturing company is suddenly hit with a massive computer crash, jeopardizing the future of the company.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: On the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: The Duke of Death
programme.desc: He is among the most infamous serial killers in American history. From 1976 to 1977, David Berkowitz terrorized New York City under his creepy self-given moniker: the Son of Sam.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: I Am A Monster
programme.desc: In 1977, the city of New York was being stalked by a seemingly faceless serial killer known as, 'Son of Sam.' But after his final shooting took him to Brooklyn, a twist of fate and a little luck led to his capture.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Dr. Death: A License to Kill
programme.desc: For nearly two decades, a physician-turned-murderer left a trail of death and mayhem across two continents.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Dr. Death: You're Next
programme.desc: Suspicious illnesses and deaths followed this once-trusted physician-turned-killer from hospital to hospital for nearly two decades and across two continents.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Frenemies
programme.desc: Parker brokers a deal with Tony to open a new cut on the Indian River. Tony's new trommel build gets derailed when a fire breaks out. Fred's greenhorn crew steps up to keep the Colonel running and on the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Resurrecting Monsters
programme.desc: Parker cleans out the gold-rich Promiseland and risks losing Sluicifer during a move to new ground. The Beets try to supercharge their season with Tony's massive new trommel. Rick turns back to Monster Red in hopes of a record season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Got Your Six
programme.desc: Tony cleans up big with the old timer's lost gold. On the brink of ending his season, Fred Lewis' team begins to crack, forcing him to make a big a decision. Rick cashes in his gold to fund his season, leaving his crew to keep the season on track.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Freddy to the Rescue
programme.desc: With added scenes and bonus content: Freddy and Juan answer Fred's SOS call while Parker's crew tallies up their gold from the Last Cut. Tony drains a holding pond to get back up and running.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Viking Detective
programme.desc: Parker and crew face a potentially catastrophic flood at the Airstrip Cut. Tony uncovers a secret patch of gold-rich ground at Paradise Hill and logs his biggest gold weigh of the year. Rick throttles up his operation with a new water system.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: Answers
programme.desc: As winter closes in and the digging season nears its end, Duane takes a final shot at getting into the underground cavern, but uncovers a whole new mystery about the land he owns.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Parker tries out virgin ground on the Fitzgerald claim and makes a big discovery. If he wants to strike a deal, he has gain the trust of the family.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Viking Detective
programme.desc: Parker and crew face a potentially catastrophic flood at the Airstrip Cut. Tony uncovers a secret patch of gold-rich ground at Paradise Hill and logs his biggest gold weigh of the year. Rick throttles up his operation with a new water system.

programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Parker tries out virgin ground on the Fitzgerald claim and makes a big discovery. If he wants to strike a deal, he has gain the trust of the family.

programme.title: Expedition X: Round-Up at Death Ranch
programme.desc: Bizarre cattle mutations in the Pacific Northwest lead Josh Gates to send his team to investigate. The baffling deaths make Jessica and Phil question if the cattle were victims of newly arrived apex predators or the target of something more sinister.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Portals to Punishment
programme.desc: Josh visits three sites where the journey is the destination. He follows a coca leaf farmer down Bolivia's perilous Death Road, explores history's most feared prison in French Guiana and investigates a mysterious 12,000-year-old structure in Turkey.

programme.title: The Scott Martin Challenge: Giant Texas Bass Team Challenge 1
programme.desc: Fishing at the Camolot Bell.

programme.desc: A spectacular stockcar crash, two Russian jets crash at an air show, a Boeing 720 is crashed to study accidents, a chemical explosion that is the largest industrial accident in US history and a man in a bulldozer wreaks havoc on a small town.

programme.title: Addictive Fishing: Redfish Fever

programme.title: The Next Bite: Deep Dropping: Giant Lake Trout on Fort Peck
programme.desc: Heavy jigs with paddle tails in deep water are used.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Crashes and Fast Passes
programme.desc: Round two of Oklahoma City's $50,000 Cash Days gets underway with rivalries quickly renewed and friendships tested as the remaining drivers put their lives on the line for a shot at the big prize.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun: Offshore Heritage
programme.desc: It's playtime for Travis and Justin when offshore guide Josh Sauls shares a secret honey hole and his fishing ancestry. Then luck shines when the guys find another sweet spot on the way back.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Turn It Up
programme.desc: A horrifying crash brings a racer to terms that his racing days might be over. For the first time in list history, Chief and Shawn must find what it takes to win without the other's help.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Boosted to the Max
programme.desc: A familiar face returns to the 405's list, bringing with him a new car with scary potential. Working on his own, Shawn tries to prove to his son he has what it takes to climb the ranks.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Mega Cash Days: All About the Benjamins
programme.desc: Bracket two race kicks off with sixteen new drivers, including No Prep King Champ Ryan Martin and Memphis leader JJ The Boss. A fresh section of road challenges every driver to put down his fast pass.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Mega Cash Days: Gimme the Loot
programme.desc: It's not over for the 12 racers who lost in bracket 2, and tonight, they're fighting to stay alive in the competition. Having to race over and over is tearing some cars apart, and racers must try not to lose before they even get to the starting line.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Star Studded Spirit
programme.desc: On this season premiere, Theresa gives readings to some of your favorite celebrities. Comedian Rosie O'Donnell, Oscar-winning actress and comic Mo'Nique, 'Mike & Molly' star Billy Gardell, and Porsha from the hit show 'Empire,' Ta'Rhonda Jones.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: The Spirits of Hollywood
programme.desc: It's a star-studded season finale with 'Don't Be Tardy's' Kim Zolciak-Biermann and the Buffalo Bills' Kroy Biermann, 'Parks & Recreation's' Jim O'Heir, 'The Goldbergs' Wendi McLendon-Covey' and 'Young & Hungry' star Kym Whitley all getting readings.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Sitcom Spirits
programme.desc: It's an hour of sitcom legends as Theresa gives readings to Martin's Tisha Campbell, Facts of Life's Mindy Cohn, Cheers' John Ratzenberger, Designing Women and Young Sheldon's Annie Potts and I Dream Of Jeannie icon Barbara Eden.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Stars and Spirits
programme.desc: Theresa's in Hollywood to read stars of the past and present. 80's superstar Taylor Dayne, Say Yes To The Dress Atlanta's Monte Durham, The Office's Kate Flannery, Roseanne's Michael Fishman, and Family Matters' dad Reginald VelJohnson.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: More to Love: The No Bang Theory
programme.desc: Brandon stands up to his parents. Jovi doesn't believe Yara's pregnant. Mike refuses to plan the wedding. Tarik and Hazel look for a third. Zied learns about Rebecca's ex. Andrew wants Amira to try again. Stephanie admits her secret.

programme.title: Unexpected: C-Section in Jeopardy
programme.desc: Myrka attends her last sonogram appointment alone due to COVID-19. Reanna's planned C-section may be in jeopardy. Lilly is pregnant with her second child. Tyra and Alex go on their first date in over a year.

programme.title: Unexpected: The Circumcision Conversation
programme.desc: Reanna gives birth during a pandemic. Jenna and Aden fight over the baby shower. Tyra has a little too much fun on her cheerleading trip in Miami, Florida. A debate over circumcision makes Lilly and Lawrence's family dinner awkward.

programme.desc: Reanna gives birth during a pandemic. Jenna and Aden fight over the baby shower. Tyra has a little too much fun on her cheerleading trip in Miami, Florida. A debate over circumcision makes Lilly and Lawrence's family dinner awkward.

programme.title: I Am Jazz: Pizza Rolls, Gender Roles and Jazz Rolls
programme.desc: The entire family supports Jazz's weight loss effort by having a family soccer match. Meanwhile, Jazz resumes hypnotherapy to control her binge eating. She also helps her friend raise money for hormones, and gathers the courage to ask out Victoria.

programme.title: I Am Jazz: Hungry for Acceptance
programme.desc: Jazz undergoes past life regression hypnosis for her weight issues and finds insight in a troubled past. She also pressures her parents to allow her to go to virtual school, and goes on her first date with a girl hoping for a romance.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Bride Overboard
programme.desc: Bride Andi and her fiancé struggle to agree on the perfect gown for their destination, sailboat wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Chances Are...
programme.desc: Tamisha and her friend battle over who has the best bridal vision. Meredith wants a simple dress for her laid-back wedding, but her family is unwilling to see her settle.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Engaged partners Amy and Lex are very much in sync - but not with each other's wedding dress styles. Then, bride Tara is looking to stand out in a non-traditional, high-neck dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: No Time for Nostalgia
programme.desc: Bride Leah is looking for a modern bridal gown with pockets to wear on her wedding day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Extra-Special Day
programme.desc: Adrianna Costa is looking to show off her figure in a sexy dress for her upcoming desert wedding, but her mom has more conservative ideas. Christine hopes to please her outspoken daughters, while still finding a dress that matches her own vision.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Pastor Princess
programme.desc: After two broken engagements, pastor bride Shaundalyn wants to look sexy on her big day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: To Sleeve, or Not to Sleeve
programme.desc: Amanda wants a dress that shows off her tattoos, but her mom prefers she covers up her ink. Southern gal Lexie needs to find a dress that matches her fiancé's family heirloom veil.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Shiny, Happy, Bling!
programme.desc: After spending her youth in outfits covered in bling, Emily wants to wear a traditional gown on her big day. Fashionista Diana is looking for a strapless gown, but her mom has other ideas. At her fitting, Jackie is still looking for her mom's approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Breaking the Bank
programme.desc: Chelsye is looking for a dress both her and her sister can agree on. Unsure of any of her wedding details, Whitney comes to the store looking for a dress with no style or budget in mind.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Mom's Way or the Highway
programme.desc: Kimberly wants to impress her fiancé in a sexy dress but her traditional mom has other ideas.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Bridal Sabotage
programme.desc: Youth Minster Tameria wants to wear a simple dress on her big day, but her fashion-forward family has other ideas. Hailey puts aside her sexy dress vision to please her future mother-in-law. Traditional bride Katie considers an unexpected gown alteration.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: There's No 'I' in Groom
programme.desc: Samantha brings her fiancé dress shopping against her mom's wishes. Kelsey asks her best friend to help her pick a wedding dress but their visions don't agree.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Brides by the Numbers

programme.title: Movie: Walking Tall
programme.desc: This film recounts the story of real-life Tennessee sheriff Buford Pusser who won fame by cleaning up his backwoods county by trying to rid the town of gambling and moonshine rings.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that stink.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers killed the idea of Joe going shirtless in the boxing ring, and which of the Jokers loves dancing but is no good at it.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Movie: Let's Be Cops
programme.desc: Two goofball buddies are mistaken for real cops when they dress up as police officers for a costume party. Fighting crime is all fun and games until they become wrapped up in a web of real mobsters and crooked detectives.

programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reanimates a chameleon fish, reboots lengthy corks, remakes the airport bird man, and more with all-new reactions.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: An Elevated Ferret Alert

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Living Trilobite
programme.desc: Find out which trick went viral on a hip-hop blog, what word is hard for Michael to pronounce and what degree Michael earned in college.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Can Only Get It Here
programme.desc: Guy is on the hunt for funky flavours, starting in San Francisco at an Asian/American/Mexican fusion joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Go-to Joints
programme.desc: Guy checks out some beloved local places.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Piggin' Out
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going big on the pig. In Colorado Springs, a funky food truck serves its pork fusion on loaded platters and Central American arepas. In Minneapolis, an Asian joint tucked away in a grocery store dishes out barbecued pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Standards to Standouts
programme.desc: Guy is hitting up all kinds of joints, from classic Italian to Modern Americana. In Jackson, a California chef is bringing his brand of Mexican to the mountains.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: A Little Lighter
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is lightening the load on this trip, starting in Boston, where he pops into Triple D's first diner to check out the egg-white omelets. Then, a Cuban joint in Los Angeles is trading in bread for plantains and stuffing avocado with fresh fish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Round the World Roundup
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri digs into a world of flavours all over the United States! In Smyrna, Georgia, a doctor-turned-chef fires up amazing Asian from righteous ramen to Korean wings. In Austin, Texas, two buddies turn out their tasty take on tacos.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Between The Bread
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's always down for a good sandwich, so he's stopping in to check out some of the Triple D Nation's latest creations. A food truck in Nashville put down roots and started churning out cheesy concoctions.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches, Spaetzle and Sticky Wings
programme.desc: Guy's caught up in a whirlwind of flavors when he visits Norfolk, Virginia. A two-for-one spot where a bomb butcher stacks sandwiches by day and a chef firing up ramen and sticky wings takes over at night.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meaty Mashup
programme.desc: In Little Rock, Ark., an old gas station-turned-eatery is pumpin' bison into a burrito and pilin' pork onto cornmeal waffles. In Santa Rosa, CA, a Vietnamese joint makes phenomenal pho and righteous barbecue pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels to Tampa Bay for authentic Mexican street food served out of a bus. In Virginia Beach, he has dinner at a popular seafood joint, and in San Antonio he visits a breakfast joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Authentic International Eats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's trip around the US is a culinary spin around the globe. He finds Chinese staples in North Pole, AK, German sausage in Portland, OR, and an authentic Ukrainian market with cabbage rolls and bigos stew in Minneapolis.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pied to Fried
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's travelling the nation and digging into all kinds of killer grub. In St. Petersburg, Florida, a lights-out spot is loading up the righteous ramen, and a New Orleans smokehouse puts out Big Easy favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Handcrafted
programme.desc: Guy checks in on tasty joints run by food fanatics, including a farm-to-table spot.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Stuffed Stuff
programme.desc: Guy Fieri knows it's what's on the inside that counts and these top spots in the Triple D Nation really know how to stuff the good stuff in. Like in Eureka, Calif., where a chef is cramming calamari with shrimp and leeks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kid Rock's Detroit Tour
programme.desc: Guy's taking Kid Rock's lead on a tour through D-town!

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Belly Up to Barcelona
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's crossing the Atlantic to take a big bite out of Barcelona, Spain. He's diving in to the many different cuisines the city has to offer, from a homey spot serving Galician-style octopus and soup.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Authentic International Eats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's trip around the US is a culinary spin around the globe. He finds Chinese staples in North Pole, AK, German sausage in Portland, OR, and an authentic Ukrainian market with cabbage rolls and bigos stew in Minneapolis.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pied to Fried
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's travelling the nation and digging into all kinds of killer grub. In St. Petersburg, Florida, a lights-out spot is loading up the righteous ramen, and a New Orleans smokehouse puts out Big Easy favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Handcrafted
programme.desc: Guy checks in on tasty joints run by food fanatics, including a farm-to-table spot.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Stuffed Stuff
programme.desc: Guy Fieri knows it's what's on the inside that counts and these top spots in the Triple D Nation really know how to stuff the good stuff in. Like in Eureka, Calif., where a chef is cramming calamari with shrimp and leeks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kid Rock's Detroit Tour
programme.desc: Guy's taking Kid Rock's lead on a tour through D-town!

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Belly Up to Barcelona
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's crossing the Atlantic to take a big bite out of Barcelona, Spain. He's diving in to the many different cuisines the city has to offer, from a homey spot serving Galician-style octopus and soup.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meaty Mashup
programme.desc: In Little Rock, Ark., an old gas station-turned-eatery is pumpin' bison into a burrito and pilin' pork onto cornmeal waffles. In Santa Rosa, CA, a Vietnamese joint makes phenomenal pho and righteous barbecue pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels to Tampa Bay for authentic Mexican street food served out of a bus. In Virginia Beach, he has dinner at a popular seafood joint, and in San Antonio he visits a breakfast joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Day Dining
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy gets a taste of every meal. In Long Beach, California, he's served some delicious short ribs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Roadtrippin' In Beantown
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is in Beantown for an all-Boston smorgasbord. Just outside the city in Allston, two restaurants share an open kitchen but have completely different menus.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Cocktail Party Rules
programme.desc: You've been invited to all of her fabulous parties, and now America's hostess with the mostess, Ina Garten, lifts the veil on all her tips, sharing techniques and incredible elegant and easy recipes.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Tex-Mex Entertaining
programme.desc: Ina Garten has all the bases covered when it comes to Tex-Mex entertaining. She makes a light and airy tres leches cake with berries and make ahead whipped cream, and her crowd-pleasing pork Posole.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Big Game Changers
programme.desc: The Kitchen is putting new twists on classic game day recipes, starting with Katie Lee's Buffalo chicken calzone and Sunny Anderson's jalapeno popper dip.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Pre-Game Burger Bash
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis gets in the game day spirit and keeps folks entertained before kickoff by hosting a pre-game burger bash.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Football Picnic
programme.desc: Before the big game, Giada De Laurentiis and her family and friends spend the day on the beach playing tag football and having an oceanside picnic. Giada serves an array of decadent picnic foods that not only feed a crowd but are perfect for game day.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Super Bowled Over
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes winning game day eats for herself and the kids. She starts with a beer cheese bread bowl and then makes hearty short rib stew served over buttered egg noodles. Her cookie salad is an unexpected treat.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Football, Football, Football
programme.desc: Ree whips up chicken nachos two-ways for the family to eat after the homecoming parade. Then she's off to her boys' football games armed with chocolate chunk cookies.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Stadium Staples
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts reveal how to recreate favorite stadium eats at home. There are nunya business chili cheese fries and pimento cheese-stuffed soft pretzels as well as beef and roasted poblano empanadas and pickled jalapeno corn dogs.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Game Day Challenge
programme.desc: Guy Fieri gives his chef friends a game day challenge. Eric Greenspan serves Nashville-style hot chicken tenders on rolls, Antonia Lofaso makes oxtail tostadas with avocado crema, and Marc Murphy scores a goal with twice-baked lobster stuffed potatoes.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Big Game Day
programme.desc: Guy Fieri has an all-star lineup of chefs cooking game day grub in his ranch kitchen. Alex Guarnaschelli serves finger foods like the classic Pigs in a Blanket.

programme.title: Cupcake Guys Training Camp: Austin
programme.desc: After retiring from the NFL, Brian Orakpo and Michael Griffin opened a cupcake shop in Austin, Texas, with their lifelong friend Bryan 'Little Bryan' Hynson. Now, the three entrepreneurs are challenging three aspiring bakers to follow their passion.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Carnivores Unite
programme.desc: One chef takes a big risk by creating a meat-lovers platter without any meat. Then, it's an Asian-inspired challenge when the chefs make bento boxes, and the final two chefs make their best nutty dishes in a sweet versus savory battle.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Cash Strapped
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli challenges four chefs to transport the judges from the hot asphalt to a tropical paradise. Then, the chefs' fate is in their own hands to create a handheld dish, and the last two standing whip up sweet treats.

programme.desc: A monster stalks and attacks a man, a couple becomes the victims of paranormal activity that turns dangerously violent, and a woman is terrorized by the ghost of her ex-husband who refuses to rest in peace.

programme.title: Extreme Paranormal Witness: Deadly Dreams
programme.desc: A single mom and her 4-year-old daughter move to an apartment in California. That night, she starts having horrific nightmares. When the paranormal activity ramps up, she goes on a journey to discover the identity of the spirit who is haunting her.

programme.title: Extreme Paranormal Witness: Psychic Detective
programme.desc: When two young women turn up dead in New Jersey, a psychic detective steps in to help police track down a serial killer.

programme.title: Extreme Paranormal Witness: The Art of Exorcism

programme.title: Extreme Paranormal Witness: The Witches' Curse
programme.desc: A coven of witches use dark magic to trap spirits inside a ramshackle plantation home in South Carolina.

programme.title: Extreme Paranormal Witness: One Foot In the Grave
programme.desc: A family moves into a perfect Colonial house in Connecticut, only to discover it was once a funeral parlor. It doesn't take long before they are attacked in their beds at night, children start seeing shadowy figures and blood oozes from the floor.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: Phantoms of the Fire
programme.desc: The team reopens legendary ghost hunter Hans Holzer's 50-year-old case of rampant paranormal activity at one of the oldest houses in Rye, New York, to find out if the terrifying and tortured souls have finally moved on or simply moved.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: They Buried me Alive
programme.desc: The team resurrects Hans Holzer's case file on the Morris-Jumel Mansion in New York City. They investigate reports of a dark and mysterious presence lurking in the shadows of the historic home decades after Holzer helped a restless spirit move on.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: A Grave Revenge
programme.desc: The team heads to San Diego to visit the Whaley House, deemed by Hans Holzer as the most haunted home in America. Their harrowing investigation reveals a dark presence may still be influencing the living in an attempt to fulfill a centuries-old vendetta.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: Blood In the Water
programme.desc: Hans believed a grisly murder haunted Staten Island's Conference House, where in 1776 a last-minute meeting failed to stop the American Revolution. But when the team returns, they're led to the water's edge where a terrible truth awaits.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: Legends and Lies
programme.desc: The team revives Hans Holzer's investigation of the Ocean-Born Mary House in Henniker, New Hampshire. They traverse multiple states and boldly wade into the dark waters of New England folklore in search of the elusive truth behind the mysterious haunting.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: Tell Me No Lies
programme.desc: Hans Holzer believed a sensational tale of heartache and murder hid the real story behind one of his most famous cases. The team heads to New York City's Old Merchant House to uncover the terrifying truth of this house.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: Phantom Hand
programme.desc: Sixty years after a phantom hand terrified a Cleveland family, Dave, Cindy, and Shane return to investigate one of legendary ghost hunter Hans Holzer's most unusual cases, and discover a disturbing pattern among the neighborhood's other hauntings.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: Edge of the Veil
programme.desc: Hans Holzer had a lifelong obsession with Rockland County, NY, the site of his first case. Half a century later, the team attempts to decode the region's rampant paranormal activity.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: Bloodline
programme.desc: The team reopens Hans Holzer's unsettling investigation of the infamous Barnstable House in Cape Cod, Massachusetts. They discover the tragic spirits from the property's past may still be seeking a horrific reckoning with the living.

programme.title: Below Deck: The One Where Jen Loses Her Mind
programme.desc: Timothy Sykes is back and once again can't live without his WiFi. Kate and Captain Lee know the expectations that are required for a guest of this magnitude and they are feeling the pressure. Jen is under intense scrutiny.

programme.title: Below Deck: The Champagne Campaign
programme.desc: It's the final night of the charter season and tensions within the crew are running high. All departments are working overtime as Timothy Sykes micromanages the crew to execute the perfect surprise for his guests. Jen attempts to be on her best behavior.

programme.title: Below Deck: Blue Skies and UTI's
programme.desc: Rachel's antics continue to torment the crew, and Elizabeth finds herself in the doghouse. Sharing his soft and vulnerable side, Captain Lee opens up to Francesca about a personal tragedy.

programme.title: Below Deck: James' Big Cannoli
programme.desc: James plays games at Elizabeth's expense, and Eddie presents Izzy with an interesting opportunity. The team rallies together for a beach cleanup, but then Francesca find outs the subordinates slept in a guest cabin without permission.

programme.title: Below Deck: Galley Talk: Hide the Salami
programme.desc: Cameras follow crewmembers living and working aboard a yacht.

programme.title: Movie: Burlesque
programme.desc: The owner of a burlesque lounge struggles to keep the club open. Meanwhile, a girl from small town Iowa falls in love with the art of burlesque and fulfills her dreams.

programme.title: Movie: It's Complicated
programme.desc: While attending their son's graduation in New York, a divorced couple rediscovers their feelings for each other. They later return to their homes believing that their affair is over, but soon find themselves continuing the relationship.

programme.title: Movie: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: When five very different students report to a Saturday morning detention, they come to find that they actually have more in common than they had originally thought.

programme.title: Summer House: Watch with the Cast
programme.desc: Summer House cast members react and give commentary on the latest episode as they each watch it for the first time.

programme.title: Summer House: Watch with the Cast
programme.desc: Summer House cast members react and give commentary on the latest episode as they each watch it for the first time.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: New Chris on the Block
programme.desc: Glenn makes changes aboard Parsifal that send the deck team into a frenzy. Madison grows closer with Georgia and lashes out at Adam for sleeping with Jenna in the master guest cabin. When Jenna catches wind, she reminds Madison who's in charge.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Awkward
programme.desc: Jenna’s jealousy mounts as the charter guests continue to shamelessly flirt with Adam. Paget and Ciara can’t get on the same page but Paget and Georgia are perfectly in tune. Adam makes a big romantic gesture for Jenna that backfires.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: My Big Fat Greek Threesome
programme.desc: After Ben apologizes for shutting down Bryan and Tiffany’s fun, the crew prepares for their next charter hailing from Oklahoma. After hours, the charter guests seem to have a threesome in the jacuzzi and once again, Danny oversteps his boundaries.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Flirting With Danger
programme.desc: When a hot bachelor charters the Sirocco, a smitten Hannah attempts to keep it professional. Wes struggles with his growing feelings for Malia as fireworks ignite between her and Adam. Bugsy and Hannah's relationship gets further strained.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: What Eze the Problem?
programme.desc: Hannah and Joao have a miscommunication over a guest excursion. In the galley, Anastasia is forced to prepare foods that go against her vegan lifestyle to please the charter guest, the 'Queen of Versailles.' June continues to struggle to impress Hannah.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: A Whole Different Ball Game
programme.desc: Baseball legend Johnny Damon comes on board with a group of his rowdiest friends making the crew work double-time. June struggles to keep her radio on, which leaves Hannah frustrated. Jack and Travis get in hot water when they fail to respond to an alarm.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Ace of Stew Face
programme.desc: With bad weather rolling in and down her second stew, Hannah scrambles to manage the interior with only Jess to rely on. Captain Sandy and Malia draw a hard line with the deck team when they call the guys out for their questionable behaviour.

programme.title: Below Deck: More Foam, Bosun!
programme.desc: Captain Lee, Kate, Eddie, and Amy are joined by five new crewmembers as they prepare the luxury yacht, Eros, for a new charter season in Abaco, Bahamas. The crew welcomes their first guests, a hard-partying hotel owner and his friends.

programme.title: Below Deck: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: 'The Real Housewives of Atlanta's' Cynthia Bailey and Claudia Jordan, along with family and friends, board the 'Eros' to celebrate Cynthia's birthday, but bad weather keeps them stuck at the dock. The crew works extra hard to pamper their guests.

programme.title: Below Deck: That Tuna is F@#!ed
programme.desc: Trevor faces the wrath of Captain Lee after putting the crew’s safety in jeopardy during their night out. Ben stresses over a charter guest with very particular dietary needs and recruits Sierra’s help with a 12-course meal he is planning.

programme.title: Movie: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: A pregnant Sophie grows closer to her mother as she shares stories of how she came to live on a Greek island and how she met three handsome young men, any of whom could be Sophie's father, but an unexpected visit from Sophie's grandmother changes things.

programme.title: Movie: Pitch Perfect 2
programme.desc: After Fat Amy accidentally exposes herself during a performance for the President, the Barden Bellas are suspended. In order to be reinstated, they enter an international a capella competition that no American team has ever won before.

programme.title: Movie: Pitch Perfect 3
programme.desc: After graduating from college, the members of the Barden Bellas reunite to put on one last show for American troops in Europe. Upon arriving, they discover that their competition uses musical instruments, something the acapella group has never faced.

programme.title: The New York Times Presents: Framing Britney Spears
programme.desc: The rise of Britney Spears was a global phenomenon; her downfall was a cruel national sport. Now, people close to her and lawyers tied to her conservatorship reassess her career as she battles her father in court.

programme.title: The New York Times Presents: Framing Britney Spears
programme.desc: The rise of Britney Spears was a global phenomenon; her downfall was a cruel national sport. Now, people close to her and lawyers tied to her conservatorship reassess her career as she battles her father in court.
