programme.desc: Teenager Starr lives two lives, her home one in a poor and mostly black neighbourhood, and her school life at a rich, mostly white prep school. When she witnesses her friend get fatally shot by a police officer, she becomes torn between her two lives.

programme.title: Snowfall: Protect and Swerve
programme.desc: Franklin and Cissy look to make an investment in the community, while Andre tries to figure out what is destroying it. Jerome unveils his new business. A new cook is competing with Franklin's crew. Teddy's operation in Mexico becomes more complicated.

programme.title: A Distant Shore: African Americans of D-Day
programme.desc: Nearly 2,000 African Americans were among the troops who stormed the beaches of Normandy. For the first time ever, seven of these forgotten heroes tell their stories.

programme.title: Dogfights: Tuskegee Airmen
programme.desc: The Tuskegee Airmen, an all-black fighter squadron, shattered racist stereotypes.

programme.title: Swamp People: Ten Most Dangerous Moments
programme.desc: A countdown of the most treacherous gator battles, hair-raising close calls and near-death moments of the past seven seasons.

programme.title: Swamp People: Ten Most Legendary Monsters
programme.desc: The swamp's ten most legendary beasts are given the countdown treatment.

programme.title: Swamp People: Gator Attack
programme.desc: Troy puts his new deckhand to the test as Daniel welcomes his grandson back. Junior returns to the swamp to help his family get the upper hand, while Ronnie and Ashley get attacked by a marsh monster.

programme.title: Swamp People: Cajun Queen
programme.desc: Troy and Pickle go after a monster known as 'Freight Train,' while Alligator Queen Liz Cavalier returns to the swamp. Ronnie and Ashley discover a sanctuary loaded with big gators.

programme.title: The World Wars: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: An assassin's bullet sparks a global conflict that quickly evolves into the deadliest war humanity has ever seen. In the chaos, a new generation of soldier emerges, including a group of men who would become the most infamous leaders of the 20th century.

programme.title: The World Wars: A Rising Threat
programme.desc: The fighting may have stopped, but tensions around the world continue to simmer just beneath the surface. Few may realize it, but the seeds of the next great global conflict have already been sown.

programme.title: Movie: Welcome to Hard Times
programme.desc: After a sadistic badman terrorizes, kills and burns a small settlement, four of the survivors remain to rebuild the town. When the killer returns, a girl deranged by hate forces the mayor into a showdown.

programme.title: Movie: Chandler
programme.desc: A private eye falls in love with ex-mistress of a racketeer.

programme.title: Movie: Badlands
programme.desc: The true story of the Charles Starkweather and Caril-Ann Fugate murders of 1958 is told.

programme.title: Movie: The Year of Living Dangerously
programme.desc: An inexperienced foreign correspondent is sent to cover the 1965 Indonesian civil war. His first overseas assignment proves to hold many obstacles, until he strikes a friendship with a Eurasian dwarf photojournalist who has all the right connections.

programme.title: Movie: Under Fire
programme.desc: Three journalists become involved with the 1979 Nicaragua revolution and aid the rebels.

programme.desc: A reporter gets caught up in the terror of the Khmer Rouge regime.

programme.title: Movie: Friday Foster
programme.desc: A fashion photographer gets wrapped up in a web of conspiracy after photographing an attempted assassination.

programme.desc: A compilation of classroom scare films about the dangers of using drugs.

programme.title: Tanbark and Turf
programme.desc: Sportscope shows the training of standard bred horses.

programme.title: Cairo 'City of Contrast'
programme.desc: Traveltalk explores the history and culture of Cairo.

programme.desc: Three star-struck orphans discover a dark and seamy world on their way to Broadway.

programme.title: Movie: Blazing Saddles

programme.title: Movie: Dr. Kildare's Crisis
programme.desc: Dr. Kildare must operate to save his fiancée's brother, who is suffering from seizures.

programme.title: A Regular Trouper

programme.title: Movie: Dive Bomber
programme.desc: A scientist fights to solve the syndrome of blackouts experienced by fighter pilots.

programme.title: Movie: The Private Life of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes searches for a missing mining engineer, and falls in love along the way.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricketsitter/ Backflip Bill
programme.desc: Bill takes Gramma to a doctor’s checkup and leaves Tilly in charge of Cricket. Cricket learns that Bill never realized his childhood dream of becoming a gymnast.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Love Is for the Birds
programme.desc: Emma and Jorge help Ravi when he starts dating a girl who is his polar opposite. Meanwhile, Zuri and Tiffany try to return an eagle egg to its nest.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Bride and Doom
programme.desc: The campers learn about Olga, the daughter of the camp founder whose ghost supposedly haunts Kikiwaka. A camp wedding may be the only way to rid the camp of the ghost.

programme.title: Jessie: Toy Con
programme.desc: Zuri must find a way to get back a cherished toy that Jessie passed on to her after she trades it to a toy collector. Meanwhile, Luke and Emma work together to teach Bertram Salsa dancing so he can compete in a dance contest to win his crush's heart.

programme.title: Jessie: Punch Dumped Love
programme.desc: Jessie grounds Emma from going to the school dance. Emma must sneak out to warn Luke his crush is dumping him. Adam Sandler, guest starring as himself, offers Luke some relationship advice at the dance.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Wesley and the Fischman
programme.desc: Gabby has to choose between keeping her new alien-babysitting gig a secret and risking it all by confiding in her extraterrestrial-obsessed best friend, Wesley.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Crybaby Duran
programme.desc: When Gabby hears a rumour about herself going around at school, she uses a telepathic alien to find out who started it, jeopardizing the alien in the process.

programme.desc: When Vanna doesn't show up to cheer tryouts, Willa tries to convince Addison that she isn't worth the trouble.

programme.title: Jessie: A Close Shave

programme.title: Jessie: But Africa Is So ... Fari
programme.desc: After misinterpreting that Jessie has gone to Africa to reunite with Brooks, the kids hop a private flight to Africa to stop her. Turns out, Jessie wasn't there, but now must go with Bertram to retrieve the kids.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Dream Moms

programme.title: Raven's Home: Because
programme.desc: Raven opens up about her own visions to the kids, sharing a special moment with Booker. The two team up to try and locate the missing money. Nia feels left out and fakes having a vision.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cook-A-Rooney
programme.desc: To raise her grade in Mr. Clodfelter's home economics class, Maddie must win the Plate Off and defeat the class master chef, Artie. Meanwhile, Joey convinces Pete to sponsor his made-up clubs at school.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Triangle-a-Rooney

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Mini-Me's and Muffin Baskets
programme.desc: The gang prepares for the A&A Music Factory's first showcase and Austin wants to surprise Ally by teaching their students one of her songs.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Rejection and Rocketships

programme.desc: When Ravi realizes he can't care for Ms. Kipling and 12 baby lizards, a slew of misunderstandings ensues, leading Jessie and kids to think that Ms. Chesterfield hired someone to turn them into belts and purses.

programme.title: Jessie: The Trouble With Tessie

programme.title: Jessie: Say Yes to the Messy Dress

programme.title: Big City Greens: Mages and Mazes/ Okay Karaoke

programme.title: Snapped: Brittany Norwood
programme.desc: An upscale store becomes a shop of horrors when a woman snaps and her co-worker is the victim of her rage.

programme.title: Snapped: Nicole Abusharif
programme.desc: A lesbian love triangle turns deadly when one woman disappears and police look to the other two for answers.

programme.title: Snapped: Kristi Lunbery
programme.desc: A woman confesses to her husband's unsolved murder; though is she telling the truth.

programme.title: Snapped: Katharine Holmes
programme.desc: A woman complains about her ex-husband, but her venting has deadly consequences.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Driven to Murder
programme.desc: When police find the body of a popular taxi driver stuffed inside the trunk of his own car submerged in a river, they struggle to find suspects until the truth reveals a terrible plot to get revenge.

programme.title: Snapped: Behind Bars: Sheila Davalloo
programme.desc: The only convicted murderer featured on 'Snapped' twice, Davalloo tells her story in an exclusive prison interview. We look back at the crimes that put her behind bars, reveal more details from her past, and examine a possible connection to a cold case.

programme.title: Snapped: Michelle Gaiser
programme.desc: A wife is the target of three assassination attempts, and her husband and his lover point the fingers at each other.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery at Heath Bar Farm
programme.desc: A popular teacher was savagely murdered in her home. There would be an arrest, a trial, and a conviction. When a bombshell came in after the verdict, the convicted murderer was given a chance at freedom.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Diabolical
programme.desc: A newlywed received terrifying emails with threats of kidnapping and death. The emails appeared to come from an ex-girlfriend. But hiding behind the threats was a cyber-secret. It was a dangerous game with someone playing for keeps.

programme.title: Snapped: Jessica Hill
programme.desc: A man dies in an apparent freak accident, but soon his wife is accused of murder and more.

programme.title: Snapped: Taylor Marks
programme.desc: A mother responds to her estranged daughter's call for help and walks into a deadly trap.

programme.title: Snapped: Stephanie Lazarus
programme.desc: An L.A. police detective turns suspect when DNA cracks a 23-year murder mystery.

programme.title: Snapped: Rachel Wade
programme.desc: A love triangle pushes two teenage girls into a deadly confrontation.

programme.title: Dateline: The Summer of Manson
programme.desc: Roger Smith, Charles Manson's former parole officer, sits down for a rare interview. He discusses how Manson's failed music career drove him to find new ways to control his followers.

programme.title: Dateline: Good and Evil
programme.desc: When a woman's body is discovered at an Anaheim trash facility, a dedicated detective makes a promise to her mother to get justice. She doesn't know that search will bring her face to face with a serial killer.

programme.title: Mysteries & Scandals: Serial Killers of the ‘80s
programme.desc: Richard Ramirez was a satanic killer terrorizing an entire state who sexually assaulted his victims. Aileen Wuornos, a highway hooker with a gun. Doug Clark and Carol Bundy prowled the Sunset Strip for sex and victims.

programme.title: Exhumed: A Murderer Among Us
programme.desc: When grandmother Erma Prince dies after a simple hip surgery, fears spread that a killer nurse could be responsible. The police do everything they can to track down the killer including exhuming Erma's body.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Day She Disappeared
programme.desc: A young mother disappeared one morning. Her husband said she went out for a run and never came home. She was found strangled to death.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Collision
programme.desc: A wife and a mistress vying for the same man, end up in a high-speed showdown on a highway. The man of their dreams, on his motorcycle nearby, was struck and killed. His wife arrested for his murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Heart Of Darkness
programme.desc: Vacationers turned prisoners, a mother, her son and a cousin kidnapped by terrorists. It was a harrowing international hostage drama and the price of freedom was a huge ransom.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Last Dance
programme.desc: A beloved kindergarten teacher and mother of two finds a new lease on life after shedding hundreds of pounds. When she suddenly vanishes from her home, investigators uncover a disturbing connection.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Troubled Waters
programme.desc: A California couple's romantic getaway on a boat turns tragic when the young wife and mother is lost at sea.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Tangled
programme.desc: At first it looked like a home invasion gone wrong at the house Ralph Candelario shared with his second wife... a robbery that resulted in the murder of Pam. But when police learned the antique dealer's first wife had disappeared, they took a closer look.

programme.title: Movie: The Hangover
programme.desc: Two days before his wedding, three friends decide to take a groom to Las Vegas. Since the bride-to-be doesn't approve of bachelor parties, the men lie to her about their trip. After a wild night of partying, the guys wake up to find the groom missing.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Simpsina
programme.desc: Lisa becomes a magician's apprentice to the legendary Great Raymondo, who helps her develop her craft. A schoolgirl crush clouds her judgment when she is coaxed into revealing the Great Raymondo's most famous magic trick to his phony arch nemesis.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Real Housewives of Fat Tony
programme.desc: Fat Tony and Selma are in love and get married after a whirlwind courtship. To ease Marge's reservations about the marriage, Fat Tony invites Homer and Marge to a weekend getaway at the Jersey Shore.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Scissorhands
programme.desc: When Homer discovers a genius talent for styling hair and opens his own salon, he becomes Springfield's most in-demand hair stylist.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 500 Keys

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Ned-Liest Catch
programme.desc: Feeling guilty for getting Mrs. Krabappel suspended after one of his school pranks, Bart helps her escape detention, and Ned Flanders winds up saving her life in the process.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Falcon and the D'Ohman
programme.desc: Homer befriends a reserved security guard recently hired by the nuclear power plant. Plagued by violent flashbacks from his past as a CIA agent, he must overcome his tortured nightmares to save Homer from a Ukrainian terrorist.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXII
programme.desc: Homer takes a dangerous dive into an isolated canyon on Candy Peak, but when a crashing boulder traps his arm, he channels the spirit of Aron Ralston to save himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Replaceable You

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Food Wife

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Book Job

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Man in Blue Flannel Pants
programme.desc: The Simpsons host a tastemaker party at their home to promote Absolut Krusty, Krusty the Clown's own brand of liquor. Mr. Burns takes notice of the party's success and decides to promote Homer to 'Account Man' for the Springfield Nuclear Plant.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Ten-Per-Cent Solution
programme.desc: Krusty the Clown gets stuck in a rut when the television network pulls his show and his talent agency drops him. When the Simpsons introduce him to an agent, they're surprised to learn she was Krusty's first-ever agent.

programme.title: Family Guy: Short Cuts
programme.desc: When Brian accidentally becomes a local hero, an old street pal and now a successful millionaire dog reaches out and tries to convince him to get neutered. Meanwhile, Lois gets a pixie cut against Peter's wishes.

programme.title: Family Guy: Heart Burn
programme.desc: In celebration of Peter and Lois' anniversary, the Griffins recount their own versions of three well-known love stories.

programme.desc: Archer's fear of cyborgs hits home when Krieger offers to make robotic legs for Gillette.

programme.title: Archer: Midnight Ron
programme.desc: The beginning of beautiful hatred between Archer and his new stepfather plays out as the two are chased by gangsters.

programme.title: Movie: The Karate Kid Part II

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Deep Sea
programme.desc: From jellyfish with 40-meter long tentacles, fish with headlights, and vampire squid, the deep sea contains some of the most extraordinary and bizarre wildlife.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hunger at Sea: Oceans
programme.desc: This episode follows blue whales, sharks, sea lions and dolphins to reveal the strategies they use to hunt for prey. The ocean is an immense wilderness; predators face an endless search to find and catch food, yet the ocean is home to remarkable hunters.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: The Blue Planet: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: The ocean and many of its inhabitants, such as the blue whale, remain a mystery.

programme.title: The Blue Planet: The Deep
programme.desc: Some of the weirdest life forms on earth live miles below the ocean surface. Meet a cast of fantastic creatures including the Fangtooth, with teeth so large it can't close its mouth.

programme.title: The Blue Planet: Open Ocean
programme.desc: Examines the predatory skills of some of the most charismatic hunters found on the planet: whales, dolphins, tuna, shark and rapier-nosed billfish.

programme.title: The Blue Planet: Frozen Seas
programme.desc: A look at the survival techniques of creatures that endure the harsh conditions of the Arctic and Antarctic.

programme.title: The Blue Planet: Seasonal Seas

programme.title: The Blue Planet: Coral Seas

programme.desc: Dr. Pol and his staff are used to busy days, and today is no different.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Curse of the Lost Cosmonaut
programme.desc: When two experts build their own radio-listening station to intercept the secret communications of American and Soviet astronauts, they capture traces of a haunting voice that may be a lost Russian cosmonaut. New, declassified evidence reveals the truth.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: To Catch a UFO
programme.desc: An intercept pilot chases a UFO only to vanish forever, then, a mysterious hum plagues 2% of the planet.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Soviet Doomsday Warning
programme.desc: A Russian radio station has broadcast a signal nonstop since the Cold War, and no one knows why; experts use hi-tech methods to investigate what it is, and what might happen if it ever stops.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Alien Evidence: The Holy Grail
programme.desc: When a powerful radio beam originating from deep space is detected by experts on earth, some suspect its hard evidence of extraterrestrial life; new investigations into this shocking signal might reveal the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Russian Star Wars
programme.desc: Multiple dashcams capture a sinister orb in the night sky above Omsk, Russia, that shoots a bright beam of light towards Earth; experts use cutting-edge imaging analysis to determine if this may be evidence of a secret Russian space-weapons program.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Church of the Death Eaters
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a swam of millions of strange creatures invading a church, some wonder if it's evidence of a grisly secret buried in the ground below. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the threat this insect army poses.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Poltergeist Hill
programme.desc: When a ghostly encounter in a cemetery is caught on camera, experts use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate if something paranormal is at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Man Who Laid an Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a man who appears to lay an egg, some experts wonder if it's evidence that scientists created a human-reptile mutant through gene manipulation. Using cutting-edge tech, investigators put this horrifying theory to the test.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Church of the Death Eaters
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a swam of millions of strange creatures invading a church, some wonder if it's evidence of a grisly secret buried in the ground below. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the threat this insect army poses.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens of Hell Highway
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a highway swarmed with snake-like creatures and an unexplained ooze, experts investigate the origins of these alien creatures; the latest tech reveals where they came from and their top-secret purpose.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Ice Cave
programme.desc: A strange cave freezes in the summer and melts in the winter, and a massive sand dune swallows a small child in an instant. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate these mysteries of the natural world.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Lost Pirate City Treasure
programme.desc: When an infamous pirate city sunk into the sea after a massive earthquake, a wealthy pirate's treasure might have disappeared with it. Rob and Stefan use cutting-edge technology to hunt for the treasure of Henry Morgan.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: America's Buried Massacre
programme.desc: Rob hunts for a legendary mass grave that could expose a dark secret of America's industrial past. High in the mountains, a giant lake is mysteriously disappearing, and Rob uses cutting-edge technology to find out why.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Great Lakes Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Alien Ice Towers
programme.desc: When strange towers of ice are found growing from in a barren, water-starved desert, experts speculate why these structures have uncanny similarities to extraterrestrial formations recently discovered on Pluto's alien landscape.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Catfish Killer
programme.desc: In a small Tennessee town, Jenelle Potter has few friends. When her attraction to one of them isn't mutual, she is ostracized and feels threatened. Then a shadowy figure guides her family into a dark plot with a twisted ending no one saw coming.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: A Thin Blue Line
programme.desc: Sheriff deputies with a perfect marriage reveal a shocking tale of good cop/ bad cop that can only end in a fugitive on the run.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Girl in the Window
programme.desc: Lisa Bradford lives a quiet, country life in Arkansas with her husband Dennis and their two young kids. Their love story takes a devastating turn when they get a visit from police, unveiling a double life of crime so heinous it rips the marriage apart.

programme.title: Shattered: The Bodies Out Back
programme.desc: 1986. A 13-year-old girl escapes her captors, then lives in fear they'll return to kill her. A young boy learns his father's fate and realizes his nightmares are memories, and a prison break leads a rookie cop on the hunt for two ruthless murderers.

programme.title: Shattered: Seven and a Half Minutes
programme.desc: Mid 1980's. A District Attorney in Wichita Falls, Texas has multiple gruesome homicides to solve. A father's grief provokes him to meet his daughter's killer face to face, and over 100 miles away, a husband is accused of the murder of his wife.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Let Her Rot
programme.desc: When Joshua Hudnall went off to war, he felt more at home in combat than he ever did around his mother. Just when Joshua thought he had escaped her torment, she set her sights on someone else, and destroyed their family from within.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Life and Death of Amie Harwick
programme.desc: An investigation into the death of a Hollywood therapist and whether the system did enough to protect her from alleged killer Gareth Pursehouse.

programme.title: Vanished in New Canaan: An ID Mystery
programme.desc: When clues at Jennifer Dulos's New Canaan, Connecticut home prompt police to search for the missing mother, her estranged husband's behaviour deepens the mystery. A complex web of evidence secures arrests, but what happens next shocks the nation.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Let Her Rot
programme.desc: When Joshua Hudnall went off to war, he felt more at home in combat than he ever did around his mother. Just when Joshua thought he had escaped her torment, she set her sights on someone else, and destroyed their family from within.

programme.desc: An investigation into the death of a Hollywood therapist and whether the system did enough to protect her from alleged killer Gareth Pursehouse.

programme.title: Vanished in New Canaan: An ID Mystery

programme.title: Shattered: Seven and a Half Minutes
programme.desc: Mid 1980's. A District Attorney in Wichita Falls, Texas has multiple gruesome homicides to solve. A father's grief provokes him to meet his daughter's killer face to face, and over 100 miles away, a husband is accused of the murder of his wife.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: A Woman's Place
programme.desc: On one terrible morning, ten year old Leona O'Loughlin doesn't show up for school while her detective father, Leo, falls violently ill.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Don't Scream
programme.desc: A young mom calls 911 claiming she cut her own throat in front of her ex-husband and child. Doctors say there’s no way she did it to herself.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: The Sins of the Father
programme.desc: When Netta McKoy moves in with her boyfriend Peter Moses Jr., she finds out he is a polygamist cult leader trying to populate a nation of Black Hebrew Israelites.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: Mafia Murder
programme.desc: Sergei Kobozev, an up-and-coming Russian boxer, immigrates to Brooklyn, NY in the early 90's with dreams of becoming a world champion. He soon proves he has the talent and determination, so when he goes missing, it's a total shock to the boxing world.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Pick Your Poison
programme.desc: Bill and Mary Yoder are a happy couple, running a medical practice outside of Utica, New York. But their world collapses when Mary becomes mysteriously sick, and detectives prove that her illness was no accident.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Killer Collection
programme.desc: Gary and Jan Tyrrell are a beloved couple living in a quaint suburb of Springfield, Missouri. The tight-knit community is soon rocked by their double homicide, with friends and neighbours looking at those closest to the pair as their potential killer.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Death Wish
programme.desc: A park ranger in Texas pulls over a suspicious truck filled with marijuana. The passenger flees deep into the desert, unleashing a manhunt that will unearth something far more sinister--and bizarre--than detectives could ever have imagined.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Daddy's Got A Gun
programme.desc: A decorated police officer and single father relies on his kind and generous neighbors to help care for his beloved daughter. When she accuses one of them of molesting her, anger boils over, all hell breaks loose... and blood flows in the streets.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Love Sick
programme.desc: In 2014, police are called to a lifeless body in a trailer in Winona, Missouri. The owners, Jason and Stephanie McClurg, have suffered a series of misfortunes which have put their marriage under enormous pressure. But nobody expected it to lead to murder.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: If the Walls Could Talk
programme.desc: A quiet affluent retirement community in Monroe, Ohio is baffled when Barbara Howe simply vanishes one night. The police soon find her body in the trunk of her car, her throat slit. The hunt for her killer takes them back to an unlikely source.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Murder Calling
programme.desc: When firefighters are called to a blazing truck, what they find in the house pales in comparison the bullet-ridden bodies of Robert and Dorothy Pape. And the heat turns up when police realize the extinguished truck belongs to someone else.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Absent Father
programme.desc: When Jim Durgan's body is found in Prison Valley, no one knows why. His estranged wife is drawing a blank and his out-of-state girlfriend can't explain it. What follows is a murky investigation that unravels a sinister and cleverly staged murder plot.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Real Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace is the most famous Scot in history. In 1296, Scotland is invaded by English King Edward I and only one man is prepared to stand in his way.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Kung Fu Nun
programme.desc: 1644. Ng Mui escapes from Beijing. Taking refuge in a Shaolin monastery, she learns their Kung Fu and develops a new form of the martial art.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Through a Toilet
programme.desc: Lifelong pals and criminals Timothy Fletcher and Doni Brown break out of a Florida prison in 2009. Anxious for freedom, the two need money. A robbery that ends in murder puts them on most wanted lists and leads cops on a manhunt across the Southeast.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be Part of the Texas Seven
programme.desc: Patrick Murphy and six other inmates pull off the largest escape in Texas history. They launch a statewide crime spree but up the ante when they kill a police officer. They hide in an RV Park but get recognized, prompting a showdown with authorities.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as Katrina Refugees
programme.desc: After killing his mother, Scott Webb and his wife go on the run. They head to Texas and fool a small-town church into taking pity on them. But when their story hits the local news, church members call police, who track the couple down in Seattle.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be MacGyver
programme.desc: Serving life for a double homicide, Harold Laird breaks out of prison with great creativity. On the lam, he evades the law in a series of near misses. Exhausted, Laird finally passes out in a stolen truck. When a cop notices, he quickly calls for backup.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Watch Those Country Girls
programme.desc: Ex-con Roger Delucenay is locked up in county jail. When his brother is sent there a few months later, the two carry out a daring escape. They run to Kentucky to lay low but when a jealous ex rats them out, the two are forced to run again to stay free.

programme.desc: Trapped and outnumbered seven to one early in the Korean War, US Marines must fight their way out or die.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mommy Can You Hear Me?/ Road Trip
programme.desc: After Candace injures her ankle and is told to stay in bed, Phineas and Ferb provide her with a box of items to stave off her boredom.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Split Personality/ Brain Drain
programme.desc: Candace accidentally gets hit by a 'splitter' ray which causes her to have two different personalities: Romantic Candace and Busting Candace. Then, Phineas and Ferb are sick with a cold, so they create a live television feed to their friends' homes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Mom Attractor/ Cranius Maximus
programme.desc: Candice asks the boys to invent a device that attracts their mom so that she can bust her brothers. In the meantime, Dr. Doofenshmirtz invents a 'Baby-Cry-Inator.' The boys invent a cerebral stimulatory hat to help Baljeet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Hawaiian Vacation
programme.desc: During a Hawaiian family vacation, Candace finds a cool lava rock necklace and is plagued with bad luck, so a native tells her she must take it to the top of a volcano, which spoils the cool, calm vibe she learned from a Hawaiian yoga instructor.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Genesis in Motion!
programme.desc: With the completion of Royal Genesis, Gwyn lets it rip in battle for the very first time! Then, Delta crashes the showdown at the Infernal Tower and challenges Arthur to a match that will put his claim of Apocalypse's invincibility to the test.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Dragon vs. Apocalypse!
programme.desc: After a shocking conclusion to the match between Delta and Arthur, it’s time for Dante to face Apocalypse! With only one night to prepare a strategy, Dante gives everything he’s got to make sure Dragon comes out on top!

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Attack of the 50 Foot Sister/ Backyard Aquarium
programme.desc: The boys create a PhineasandFerbalizer to speed up the growing process of vegetables.

programme.title: DuckTales: The First Adventure!
programme.desc: Scrooge is forced to babysit young Donald and Della as they go on their first adventure to find a powerful artifact, unaware that Bradford is taking on this mission personally.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster/ Candace Loses Her Head
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide to beat boredom by building the best roller coaster ever in their backyard, and Candace's birthday present is to get her face carved into the side of Mount Rushmore.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Are You My Mummy?/ Flop Starz
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide they want their very own mummy after visiting a local Egyptian movie theatre. A reality show singing competition comes to town and the boys decide they want to become one hit wonders.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Jerk de Soleil/ Toy to the World
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on their own show when the Cirque De Lune is unexpectedly cancelled. Then, the boys invent the world's most popular toy, but it doesn't do anything.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: A Hard Day's Knight/ I, Brobot
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on a medieval tournament; Candace takes the role of the Black Knight.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: The family rallies an army to defend against an invasion. As Della and the kids search the globe for reinforcements, Scrooge leads his ragtag troops against Lunaris’ forces.

programme.title: DuckTales: They Put a Moonlander on the Earth!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: Double-O-Duck in You Only Crash Twice!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Phantom and the Sorceress!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Forbidden Fountain of the Foreverglades!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape from the ImpossiBin!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Split Sword of Swanstantine!
programme.desc: The kids pair off to find the missing pieces of a mystical sword hidden throughout an Istanboar marketplace, unless F.O.W.L. gets to them first.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Visit From Little Sven
programme.desc: Rose's cousin Sven, arrives in Miami for a visit just prior to him being married by arrangement. However, when Blanche plays a trick on her latest beau, which involves Sven, the naive groom falls for her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Audit

programme.desc: A wartime buddy of Rose's late husband arrives in Miami to see Rose. However, he has more in mind than just a friendly visit. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Blanche haggle over the same dress to wear to a social event.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Artist
programme.desc: Dorothy, Blanche and Rose all agree to pose for the Hungarian sculptor Laszlo.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche's Little Girl
programme.desc: Blanche is thrilled by a visit from her daughter, Rebecca, an ex-model who has now gained quite a bit of weight. Also visiting with Rebecca is her oafish beau who constantly puts down her weight.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dorothy's New Friend
programme.desc: Dorothy befriends a novelist, Barbara Thorndyke, and she quickly infringes on Dorothy's relationship with Blanche and Rose, who think Barbara is nothing but a stuck up snob.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Grab That Dough

programme.title: Very Scary People: Jim Jones: Unholy Massacre
programme.desc: More than 900 Americans died in an isolated jungle in northern Guyana in November 1978. Jim Jones, has gone down in history as a madman who drove his followers to suicide. But the truth is more complicated and more tragic than that.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hack Attack
programme.desc: A successful and growing manufacturing company is suddenly hit with a massive computer crash, jeopardizing the future of the company.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: On the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.desc: Small-town girl Angelica is looking for bling in the big city, but her entourage is skeptical. Socialite Tracy needs an over-the-top dress for her royal Kentucky wedding, and Lonaa unearths a Randy dress from over 20 years ago for her wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Watteau Is the Word of the Day
programme.desc: Jennifer wants to break out of her taekwondo uniform, but her mom won't let it go. Madison is forced to choose sides when her two moms' opinions collide. Rebecca rides a mechanical shark all the way to the altar.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Hollywood Meets Bollywood
programme.desc: Stephanie tries to please her squabbling parents, and a former pageant queen wants a dress with a Hollywood-meets-Bollywood vibe.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Whose Side Are You On?
programme.desc: Michaella is getting married in an Irish castle, and she wants a princess dress for less than a king's ransom. Also, fashionista Shavonne has a high-style reputation to maintain.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dressed to Thrill
programme.desc: From dresses fit for royalty to dresses that are barely there, our brides took their shopping to a whole new level this season. Randy recalls the looks that killed and the dresses that thrilled.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Kenae's Journey
programme.desc: Kenae' was already big before her weight gain took off after the death of her beloved mother. Refusing to deal with the pain, Kenae' turned to food to fill the void. But she'll be reunited with her mom soon if the denial continues.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Carrie's Story
programme.desc: 20 years after her dad died as a result of a botched weight loss surgery, Carrie is on the brink of eating herself to death. To live, she must face the fear and grief of losing her father and end a cycle of toxic behavior with her husband Chris.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Swamp Mates/ One Trick Sponge
programme.desc: Bubble Bass gets stranded with Patrick in a swamp looking for a lost action figure.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Slammer/ Pineapple RV
programme.desc: When Plankton breaks the law, Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krab into a jailhouse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Place for Pets/ Lockdown for Love
programme.desc: Customers bring pets into Krusty Krab, and Mr. Krabs learns pets are more profitable than owners. And, when Plankton ruins a date with Karen, she puts the Chum Bucket on lockdown until he can show affection.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Koncessionaires/ Dream Hoppers

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Lighthouse Louie/ My Two Krabses
programme.desc: SpongeBob's good intentions and overzealous nature create chaos in an underwater city.

programme.title: Danger Force: Lil' Dynomite

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Sonogram at the End
programme.desc: Ross's ex-wife, Carol, tells him she is pregnant and wants to give the baby both her and her female lover's last names, but not Ross's. Monica goes on a manic cleaning spree to impress her parents, who favour Ross.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Thumb
programme.desc: Chandler's reunited with his beloved cigarettes, which the rest of his friends can't stand. Monica dates a man all her buddies love but with whom she's bored. And Phoebe can't deal with the fact that her bank gave her one thousand dollars that isn't hers.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Solar Calculator, a Game Ball and a Cheerleader's Bosom
programme.desc: Sheldon struggles with newfound popularity after utilizing statistics to help the football team.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: Pongo Pygmaeus and a Culture that Encourages Spitting
programme.desc: Sheldon starts an internet flame war, and Missy stands up to the boys on her baseball team. Also, Meemaw is unhappy when George Sr. spends time with her new boyfriend.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: The Sin of Greed and a Chimichanga From Chi-Chi’s
programme.desc: The University makes George Sr. a lucrative job offer in the hopes of recruiting Sheldon. Also, Georgie gets a job working for Meemaw’s new boyfriend, and Mary is determined to rid her home of greed.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Party Invitation, Football Grapes and An Earth Chicken
programme.desc: Mary gets Pastor Jeff involved when Sheldon isn’t invited to Billy’s birthday party. George Sr. has 'male-bonding time' with Dr. Sturgis.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: Teenager Soup and a Little Ball of Fib
programme.desc: Sheldon fakes being sick to avoid a swim test at school. Also, Dr. Sturgis spies on Meemaw’s new boyfriend.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Political Campaign and a Candy Land Cheater
programme.desc: Unhappy that school funds are going towards football rather than academics, Sheldon decides to run for class president.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Live Chicken, a Fried Chicken and Holy Matrimony
programme.desc: George Sr. and Meemaw struggle to manage the Cooper household while Mary plans Pastor Jeff’s wedding.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: Body Glitter and a Mall Safety Kit
programme.desc: Sheldon learns to listen when an emotional Paige struggles with her parents’ divorce. Also, George Sr. is furious when Georgie tries to buy his way out of chores.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: Contracts, Rules and a Little Bit of Pig Brains
programme.desc: George Sr. and Georgie go camping with Meemaw’s new boyfriend, Dale, but things get complicated when her ex-boyfriend, Dr. Sturgis, tags along. Also, Sheldon and Missy invent a super-game.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Slump, a Cross and Roadside Gravel
programme.desc: Sheldon and Georgie mine for platinum in roadside gravel. Also, Mary is concerned when Missy misuses religion to help with a batting slump.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Boyfriend's Ex-Wife and a Good Luck Head Rub
programme.desc: Meemaw meets Dale’s ex-wife, June. Also, Sheldon is forced to work on a group project with reluctant college students.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: Pasadena
programme.desc: Sheldon visits CalTech for the very first time. Also, Georgie is furious when Mary listens in on a phone call with his girlfriend, and Meemaw tries to cheer up a jealous Missy.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: An Academic Crime and a More Romantic Taco Bell
programme.desc: Dr. Sturgis is furious when Sheldon accuses him of plagiarism. Mary sets out to find a 'girl trophy' for Missy’s end-of-season baseball ceremony, and Georgie has an awkward run-in with Veronica while on a date with his new girlfriend, Jana.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Couple Bruised Ribs and a Cereal Box Ghost Detector
programme.desc: When George Sr. accidentally lands the school librarian, Ms. Hutchins, in the hospital, the Cooper family must nurse her back to health.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A House for Sale and Serious Woman Stuff
programme.desc: When Sheldon learns the house next door is for sale, he takes it upon himself to find the perfect neighbors. Also, Missy is torn when she’s forced to pitch against her boyfriend at the baseball game.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Baby Tooth and the Egyptian God of Knowledge
programme.desc: Sheldon has a scientific breakthrough at the dentist’s office. Also, Dale and Meemaw go to the casino, and Georgie makes a big mistake when Dale leaves him in charge of the store.

programme.title: Could you Survive? With Creek Stewart: Trapped in Quicksand
programme.desc: A young woman races for rescue as her boyfriend is trapped and slowly dying in a freezing Utah river, each of them thinking they have said goodbye for the last time.

programme.title: Could you Survive? With Creek Stewart: Forest Crash
programme.desc: A freak car accident leaves a man unable to move and fighting for his life, just a few hundred feet from a busy Houston highway.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Surviving the Outdoors
programme.desc: Real-life video from the great outdoors that tests skills against raging rapids, dangerous bears and a bug burrowing in an ear. How to survive a seven-story fall into a glacier and lasting six days in the hot desert with no food or water is featured.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Wildfires and Flash Floods
programme.desc: Blinding snow, suffocating sand and scorching flames. How to survive a raging inferno approaching and how to escape a car if caught in a flash flood and sinking fast.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Lightning and High Winds
programme.desc: Footage of ferocious flash floods, perilous summer snow and a parasailing disaster is featured. Also, survival from being stuck by a lightning bolt.

programme.title: Could you Survive? With Creek Stewart: Alaskan Nightmare

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Burning Treasure

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: A Hell of a Pull
programme.desc: A rolled-over load of scrap metal defies gravity and Kevin's patience. The Cornwall crew rides to the rescue of a fire truck, and County Towing struggles to get a grip on an icy highway.

programme.title: Top Ten Heroes and Survivors
programme.desc: Getting caught in extreme weather can lead to dire and dangerous circumstances. For those who find themselves trapped by ferocious conditions, the spirit to survive or an offer of a heroic helping hand is often the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Top Ten Record Setters

programme.title: Hoarders: Linda and Kerry
programme.desc: Linda hoarded out a 180-acre historic farm in preparation for the end of times and is facing the potential loss of her property to city authorities if she can't clean up. Kerry started hoarding plants after he lost his job as a military medic.

programme.title: Hoarders: Peggy and Ed and Connie
programme.desc: Peggy's hoard of filth and dead animal carcasses has led the city to deem her house uninhabitable. If she does not clean up, city officials will not allow Peggy to return to her beloved home.

programme.title: Hoarders: Maggie and Ann
programme.desc: Maggie's home is so packed with her shopping addiction that her granddaughter was forced to sleep on top of piles and shower outside with a garden hose.

programme.title: Hoarders: Lonnie and Linda
programme.desc: Lonnie is a famed neurosurgeon and former Lt. Governor of the State of Nevada. He is also a notorious hoarder, spending an estimated $10 million on his collections. Linda's loved ones are on the verge of having authorities remove her from her home.

programme.title: Hoarders: Sybil and Ron
programme.desc: Sybil's hoard is so intense that mice have started to live in her tub and her refrigerator. Ron has hoarded out his camera shop to the point where he has lost many of his customers.

programme.title: Hoarders: Kathy and Elmira
programme.desc: Kathy has hoarded out her triplex and a dance studio and is facing financial ruin if she can't clean up and rent out her spaces.

programme.title: Hoarders: Dorothy and David and Doris
programme.desc: Dorothy and David fell in love with each other over their mutual love of hoarding. Their home is so packed now it has become physically unsafe for Dorothy, and doctors have said one more fall in the hoard could paralyze her.

programme.title: Hoarders: Sandy and Len
programme.desc: Len lives in a home stuffed full of garbage bags where he keeps all his belongings. If he doesn't clean up, his family fears his house will kill him.

programme.title: Hoarders: Roxann and Barbara
programme.desc: Roxann is a vibrant, beautiful 32-year old mother and former model who has successfully hidden her hoarding until now. She fears Child Protective Services will intervene if she doesn't clean up her hoarded home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Hearty Helpings
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's plate is full of heaping helpings, starting with a Pittsburgh joint serving' local staples. A Florida diner with northern inspiration is spreading out all over the South, and the second generation churns out award-winning chili in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Around The World
programme.desc: It's an international affair as Guy Fieri revisits old favourites. The Triple D Nation took notice in Miami when a Latin-inspired place opened a fast-casual joint to serve the masses, and their burger tower is the talk of the town.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: World Class Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's crossing the country to get a taste of world-class flavour. From California to Florida and Seattle to Massachusetts, he's divin' into classic Greek, legit pierogis, and real-deal Belgian waffles made European-style.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Extra Helpings
programme.desc: This trip, it's an exclusive peek at the lost footage of DDD: the places Guy Fieri's visited before, but all-new dishes never seen until now. Guy's digging in to money mussels, crispy pork skin and a lights-out lamb sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Meatballs To Lollipops

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Double Game Day
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's family is football crazy, and her and Ladd's alma maters are playing on TV, so she's preparing a game night spread: kicked up spicy wings with a cool blue cheese dip, quick chili, and make-ahead sandwich rolls.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: Game Food

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quarterback Training

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: I Love What You Do for Me
programme.desc: Max offers to help Christine make a major life change after she realizes that her five-year car lease is up and her life hasn't evolved in all that time.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Scream
programme.desc: A good-looking cop, who Old Christine assumes is a stripper, alerts her there is a prowler in the neighbourhood, she convinces Matthew to stay over. New Christine goes into labour on Old Christine's birthday.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Get Smarter
programme.desc: Christine has Matthew and Barb throw her a 'surprise' engagement party so she can get to know Max's friends. She begins to feel intellectually inferior to one particular guest and makes a surprising decision.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Triangle

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Custody Battle

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Flu Attack (aka The Flu)
programme.desc: A week before an awards ceremony, Blanche, Dorothy and Rose each come down with a nasty flu, which compounds their arguing over who will win a prestigious award.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Joust Between Friends
programme.desc: Laid off from work, Dorothy searches for part-time work which leads to Blanche getting her a job at the museum. Then fur flies when Dorothy is handed the job of organizing a banquet, the duty Blanche was hoping for.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Actor

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Friends
programme.desc: Dorothy learns that Sophia's new friend is suffering from Alzheimer's disease.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: Blanche makes a move at Ted, Stan's brother, the minute she learns he's a neurosurgeon. She is furious when she discovers the only woman Ted is apparently interested in is Dorothy. Meanwhile, Rose is suffering from insomnia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Three on a Couch

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Charlie's Buddy

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Artist

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Grab That Dough

programme.desc: Revisit with the top dogs of Puppy Bowls past and reminisce on sixteen years of MVPs, underdogs, and game-winning moves. Find out how these competitive canines are living their post-championship life and which pup will win the title of, "Best in Show!"

programme.title: Jessie: To Be Me or Not to Be Me

programme.title: Big City Greens: Quiet Please/ Chipwrecked

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Ice Breaker

programme.title: Dead of Winter: The Widows of Winter

programme.title: See No Evil: All Eyes on Megan

programme.title: Sean Taylor: Murder of a Football Legend

programme.title: Aaron Hernandez: An ID Murder Mystery: The Boy From Bristol
programme.desc: When a friend of Aaron Hernandez is found dead near his home, investigators turn their gaze on the New England Patriot. At trial, a sensational family drama unfolds as Aaron fights for his life. Later, links to another brutal slaying emerge.

programme.title: Aaron Hernandez: An ID Murder Mystery: A Family Affair
programme.desc: Facing charges for the murder of Odin Lloyd, Aaron Hernandez's once acclaimed star status is in free fall. The testimony of two sisters threatens to tear a family apart. The trial reaches a dramatic conclusion, but Aaron's troubles are far from over.

programme.title: Aaron Hernandez: An ID Murder Mystery: Secrets and Demons
programme.desc: With Jose Baez by his side, Aaron's back in the courtroom facing startling new allegations. After the verdict, his life takes another violent turn. In an exclusive interview, Aaron's high school friend reveals long held secrets from their past.

programme.title: Aaron Hernandez: An ID Murder Mystery: The Boy From Bristol
programme.desc: When a friend of Aaron Hernandez is found dead near his home, investigators turn their gaze on the New England Patriot. At trial, a sensational family drama unfolds as Aaron fights for his life. Later, links to another brutal slaying emerge.

programme.title: Sean Taylor: Murder of a Football Legend
programme.desc: When star NFL player Sean Taylor is murdered in his Miami home following a home invasion, investigators must separate truth from lies to solve the horrific crime.

programme.title: 48 Hours: All American Murder: The Rise and Fall of Aaron Hernandez
programme.desc: Best-selling author James Patterson investigates the life and death of convicted murderer and former New England Patriot Aaron Hernandez. It's a fascinating but troubling crime story that explores why such a successful athlete fell so hard from grace.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: Standoff at Trader Joe's
programme.desc: For the first time, some of the hostages reveal the terrifying three hours they spent fearing for their lives while held inside a Los Angeles grocery store that was locked down by a gunman.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: No Mercy
programme.desc: A man is found murdered in what appears to be a home-invasion robbery. Closer inspection makes detectives believe it was a personal attack, and look for suspects, including his wife.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Message From the Grave
programme.desc: Michelle Despinasse is shot inside her own home in Nanuet, New York. She is rushed to hospital but succumbs to her injuries. Investigators discover that in her final moments, Michelle made a secret recording that will reveal her killer's identity.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother's Secret
programme.desc: Danyall White tells the gripping true story of her brother Richard. Danyall always thought he was a prankster who told stories. But when his stories started getting more and more violent, she slowly realized that her brother was hiding a monstrous secret.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Not My Boy
programme.desc: George and Margaret Keller never suspected that the man terrorizing their city could be a member of their own family. As it dawns on them that their son is hiding a sinister secret, they must decide whether or not to turn him in.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Avert Your Eyes
programme.desc: When Pamela Edwards is found shot through the heart, Lt. Joe Kenda's first task is to shield her young daughters from the horrendous scene. Soon police close in on her killer, ending with a white-knuckle car and foot chase across Colorado Springs.

programme.title: Death of a Lineman
programme.desc: 22-year-old Marlin Barnes, a linebacker for the University of Miami, is found dead in an apartment, along with his friend 22-year-old Timwanika Lumpkins. Detectives must trace both victims' footsteps in the previous weeks to find the killer.

programme.title: Fall of a Football Star
programme.desc: Rae Carruth, once thought to be a rising star in the NFL, has a hard fall from grace when he conspires to have his pregnant girlfriend, Cherica Adams, murdered.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Air McNair
programme.desc: Retired NFL superstar Steve McNair is found shot to death along with his young mistress. Pat Postigilone reveals the true story of his investigation and its shocking conclusion, which has become the most talked about murder mystery in Nashville history.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Big League Murder
programme.desc: Tommy and Tamara Kane appear to have it all. He's a pro football player for the Seattle Seahawks; she's a devoted mother living in Montreal. Distance keeps this couple together, but when Tommy's career ends, the proximity will tear them apart.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Never Predicted
programme.desc: When Andrea Farrington meets fellow employee Alex Kozak she thinks that romance could be on the horizon. She has no idea that feelings of romance will be replaced by suspicion and fear, leading to a final rejection that has fatal consequences.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Roadside Stories

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Past and Present

programme.desc: Take a tour through New York, and visit bakeries that have unique takes on classic Italian sweets.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Brunch
programme.desc: Hotspots that take a sweet brunch and turn it into something utterly unique.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Then and Now
programme.desc: We visit pastry chefs who take time-honoured traditions from their past and turn them into something new and unique.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Flavors of the World
programme.desc: From Cuban cuisine to South Korea's legendary dishes, Eddie Jackson brings a taste of delicious, authentic flavors from around the world to please the taste buds.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Crazy for Crunch
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson takes a deep dive into some deep-fried dishes that are sure to satisfy the craving for crunch. These creations have crunchy coatings so crispy that you have to see it to believe it.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Voted "Most Popular"
programme.desc: We're sharing seven of the most popular go-to dishes from restaurants across the country.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Southern Charm
programme.desc: Rogers checks out the best rich, hearty, home-style cooking straight from the South.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Extra Crispy
programme.desc: We're tracking down the crunchiest, flakiest and noisiest favorite foods in New York.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Big Cheese
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro, Geoffrey Zakarian, Jamika Pessoa and Bobby Flay are just a few of your favorite food personalities sharing their all-time favourite ways to indulge in some cheesy goodness.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Undiscovered Hawaii
programme.desc: Andrew wants to find out what Hawaiians really like to eat. From dried octopus bile sac to crispy pork intestine, Andrew gets a taste of Hawaii's other side.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern finds that you can still get a taste of the Wild West in the food of Denver, offering a goldmine of flavours from the past and present.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portland, OR
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shares the best of weird and wild Portland, OR, a city whose personality is apparent in its food culture. Local favorites include boozy doughnuts, Thai fish sauce chicken wings and even crawfish boils.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Trinidad And Tobago
programme.desc: Andrew samples the island flavors and culinary mashups of Trinidad and Tobago. These islands have a passion for food and life, featuring dishes like curried crab with dumplings, crispy fried shark sandwiches and soft and silky flatbreads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Key West
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern delights in the fun and funky flavors of Key West, Florida. From conch fritters, coconut pink shrimp and fried hogfish sandwiches to toasty Cubanos and quintessential Key lime pie, Key West is full of fresh eats and local ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of the Dominican Republic, a meat-lover's paradise. From whole roast pig and crispy, Lebanese-inspired fried dough pockets to beef and plantain casseroles, Dominican gastronomy is full of surprises.

programme.desc: Not your average underdog story.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The MiSFIT/ Return to Sycorax
programme.desc: In order to recruit child prodigy, Rishi Patel, Professor Granville enlists Hiro to give him a tour of SFIT. Krei goes missing in the old Sycorax building.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The New Nega-Globby / De-Based
programme.desc: Globby and Honey Lemon feel guilty about Nega-Globby being trapped in the Glop-Vac. Basemax gets infected with a virus from a spam email.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Maximum Venom: Web of Venom
programme.desc: When Spider-Man and Max Modell experiment on a sample of Venom symbiote, it escapes and unleashes a weapon of unknown purpose.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Maximum Venom: Amazing Friends
Beyblade Burst Rise: Dragon vs. Genesis!
programme.desc: Dante’s epic triumph over Arthur ignites his fame in the Blading world as a hero! Intrigued by his win, Gwyn asks Dante to battle him next! Meanwhile, Delta thinks of leaving the world of Blading behind.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Rebirth! Master Devolos!
programme.desc: Fired up from his most recent loss, Dante trains harder than ever to become as strong as Gwyn and Genesis. However, training is interrupted with news of a major match at the Infernal Tower! Someone is hungry for revenge against Arthur.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Lizard Whisperer/ Robot Rodeo
programme.desc: After being inadvertently zapped by a 'gigantinator' ray, Phineas and Ferb's chameleon grows to the size of a dinosaur. Candace and Stacy are upset because Stacy's mom does not think they are responsible enough to go to a concert on their own.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape from the ImpossiBin!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Get Busted
programme.desc: Candace has finally busted her brothers and sent away to Smile Away Reformatory School. How long can Candace enjoy her summer with Jeremy and Stacy instead of her usual routine?

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Greece Lightning/ Leave the Busting to Us!
programme.desc: The boys stage a chariot race through the streets, just like it was done in ancient Greece. Candace secretly films her brothers designing a white-water rafting ride.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Boyfriend From 27,000 B.C./ Voyage to the Bottom of Buford
programme.desc: Boys go on an archaeological dig and find a real caveman; he falls in love with Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Put That Putter Away/ Does This Duckbill Make Me Look Fat?
programme.desc: Candace is sick and recruits Stacy to bust Phineas and Ferb building mini-golf course.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day
programme.desc: During Luz's first day of Magic School, curiosity gets the best of her, and she finds herself thrown into the Delinquent Track, where she's not allowed to learn magic.

programme.title: The Owl House: Sense and Insensitivity
programme.desc: When King becomes a bestselling author, he learns a valuable lesson in reading the fine print.

programme.title: The Owl House: Really Small Problems
programme.desc: King confides in a carnival fortune teller who makes his dream come true, but it comes at a cost.

programme.title: The Owl House: Enchanting Grom Fright
programme.desc: Luz experiences Grom, Hexside's version of prom, and it's not what she expects.

programme.desc: Richard meddles in Judea's search for a date to the ball and Stacey expands her culinary skills.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Harm
