programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating an expansive 1950s ranch-style home. She updates the exterior with faux stone and adds another floor to the 3,000-square-foot home, but rain and an old fireplace force her to rethink her plans and budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Stairway to Master Suite Heaven
programme.desc: Tamara Day uses her 1,400-square-foot second-story addition to create three new bedrooms in a 1950 ranch home.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Pain in the Deck
programme.desc: Continuing renovations on a large and bland contemporary home, Tamara tackles the master suite and replaces lots of dated cabinetry to make a stylish bathroom. She also creates a home heater and an immense deck and patio.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All About the Island
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a large 1905 colonial with seven sun porches. She overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet, but unsupported floors and a strange noise during demo slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: Tamara creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet. However, her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit and her plan to save a vintage fireplace might be out of gas.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Bumming About the Plumbing
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist home that's short on bathrooms but not short on charm. She restores the front door, updates the fireplace and renovates the kitchen, but struggles with sewer and roof issues.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Mirror, Mirror on the Bathroom Wall
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist that has only one bathroom. She doubles the size of the walk-in closet and enlarges the master suite, but her hopes of updating the home's bedrooms start to sink when her contractor discovers a leak.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Tamara's Tudor Tutorial
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1927 Tudor by blowing out the existing small kitchen and outfitting it with a large island and eating nook. She transforms a bedroom into a dining room, but her hopes of refurbishing the deck begin to break apart.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Shower Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara takes on a behemoth 1927 Tudor house, but while she admires the home's original details, her dad discovers a problem. She uses a kitchenette to create a bar, revamps an uneven patio and enlarges the master bathroom.

programme.title: Building Alaska: My Life Is in Your Hands
programme.desc: Three new couples challenge the Alaskan elements. Mike and Kathleen Kondus build atop a windy tundra, first-time builders Mike and Teresa Oldenkamp construct a complex cabin and Paige Drobny and Cody Strathe create a dog-training facility on haunted land.

programme.title: Building Alaska: From Temporary to Permanent
programme.desc: Mike and Kathleen begin on the foundation, but their nail gun goes on the fritz and the posts aren't level. Dog mushers Paige and Cody run low on supplies. Mike and Teresa work on their foundation with a damaged excavator.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Life of Near Misses
programme.desc: Paige and Cody realize they don't have the correct insulation for their log walls. Kathleen and Mike's team get dangerously high up to install the ridge beam. Mike and Teresa begin work on their floor, but discover the joists are not evenly spaced.

programme.title: Building Alaska: It's Stressful Right Now
programme.desc: Mike and Teresa begin building their walls, but the winch is more dangerous than they realized. Paige and Cody use a boom truck, forcing the team to work extra cautiously. Mike and Kathleen find a nasty surprise at the bottom of the mountain.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charleston, SC
programme.desc: Casey heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. He takes on the belt buster challenge where he must consume a two-pound burger, three pounds of nachos, a hulking order of tater tots and a 12-ounce milkshake in 20 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sleepy Hollow, NY
programme.desc: Casey visits spooky Sleepy Hollow, New York, where he tries the massive headless horseman burger and takes on the Dawg House challenge in which a roll of the dice chooses twelve insanely topped hot dogs that he must eat in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Fargo, ND
programme.desc: Casey’s eating adventure takes him to Fargo, North Dakota for a hearty European take on a cheesy classic, a breakfast-dessert mash up, and the Boiler Room’s Hot Dish Challenge – a massive Midwestern meal made for the entire family…or just one man.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Deadwood, SD
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide nosh brings him to Deadwood, South Dakota. He's in this Black Hills outlaw town to go back in time at an old west saloon, chow down on a fried state staple and tackle one tough hombre.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Scottsdale, AZ
programme.desc: Casey’s culinary quest brings him to Scottsdale, Arizona where he’ll fry up a Latin staple, take on a stone age feast, and take on a four-pound deli platter in the Chompie’s Day at the Deli Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Denver
programme.desc: Adam visits the Mile-High City for burgers with enough toppings to fill a dartboard, some Rocky Mountain oysters, and a showdown with the biggest burrito in the West.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: You've Got Ale
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Wisconsin State Fair, where a local brewery is serving the ultimate deep-fried combo of beer, brats and cheese curds.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gourmets of the Galaxy
programme.desc: The Iowa State Fair welcomes Noah Cappe with a trio of meaty masterpieces, but it's the double Dutch almond funnel that has everyone jumping with joy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Fryin' King
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Big Fresno Fair in California for the debut of some new fair foods, including the Flamin' Hot Chimichanga and Rainbow Shrimp Fries.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fries in Disguise
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives at the Volusia County Fair in Florida, where two carnival classics get a makeover for the cheesy tater corndog and the black forest funnel cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The King's Peach
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the Big Fresno Fair in California, where local legend Chicken Charlie has a triple treat stacked up on a stick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fairground Showdown
programme.desc: In this all-star episode of Carnival Eats, host Noah Cappe visits California, home to some of the biggest and best fair in America.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Hot 'n' Spicy
programme.desc: The temperature is rising, and some folks like it really hot! Eddie Jackson shares hot and spicy dishes that give a little sweet, a little savory and a whole lot of spice.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Pizza Party
programme.desc: There's so much to love about pizza- crispy crust, savory sauce, ooey-gooey cheese and endless options for toppings. Pizza might just be the perfect meal, and Eddie Jackson has a day full of out-of-the-box slices to prove it.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Fried and Gone to Heaven
programme.desc: Some fried food is so crispy, so crunchy and so incredible that you feel like you've died and gone to heaven. Jeff Mauro heads to Proxi in Chicago for a food frenzy with the most-unique version of street corn ever imagined. Simon Majumdar takes his taste.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stacked
programme.desc: With layers upon layers stacked with flavour and ingredients, these favorite dishes seem too good to be true. Wolfgang Puck gushes about an unimaginable seafood platter at Cassia in Los Angeles.

programme.desc: Hiro’s faith in his friends starts to fray when they show up late to a mission. Hiro and a short-handed Big Hero 6 must attempt to stop Noodle Burger Boy and his new sisters.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The MiSFIT/ Return to Sycorax
programme.desc: In order to recruit child prodigy, Rishi Patel, Professor Granville enlists Hiro to give him a tour of SFIT. Krei goes missing in the old Sycorax building.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Never Smooch a Snake
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Got Any Gravy?

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Primal Perry
programme.desc: When Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter who wants to destroy him, he must find a way to defeat this villainous foe.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Perry the Actorpus/ Bullseye!
programme.desc: When Perry wins a contest and becomes the spokesanimal for Totally Tools, his secret identity is put into jeopardy.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Night of the Living Pharmacists
programme.desc: Doofenshmirtz's latest '-inator' accidentally turns the citizens of Danville into contagious Doof-zombies who run rampant all over town. Agent P and the kids must work together to save Danville and avoid becoming Doof-zombies themselves.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Dude, We're Getting the Band Back Together!
programme.desc: The kids put on a concert in the backyard featuring their parents' favourite old band when Dad forgets his anniversary with Mom.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mom's Birthday Episode/ Journey to the Center of Candace
programme.desc: Candace wants to plan a special birthday for Mom; Phineas and Ferb build a submarine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Are You My Mummy?/ Flop Starz
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide they want their very own mummy after visiting a local Egyptian movie theatre. A reality show singing competition comes to town and the boys decide they want to become one hit wonders.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bully Bust/ Backyard Hodge Podge
programme.desc: Candace challenges Buford to keep the boys' invention from disappearing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Traffic Cam Caper/ Bowl-R-Rama Drama
programme.desc: Candace tried to prove her brothers inventions by getting footage from a traffic camera.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Der Kinderlumper/ Just Desserts
programme.desc: Candace is chosen to be Rutabega princess and gets to start the Running of the Chinchillas.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: When Worlds Collide/ Road to Danville
programme.desc: Discovering that a strange planet is hurtling directly towards Danville, Phineas and Ferb set out to avert a disaster, while Buford looks forward to making contact with its alien race. Dr. Doofenshirmtz hopes to steal the world's largest ball of twine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bubble Boys/ Isabella and the Temple of Sap
programme.desc: Baljeet takes a break from his intense studying to go around town inside a giant bubble with Phineas and Ferb. Isabella, Adyson and the rest of the Fireside Girls go on an adventure to obtain a patch for sap collecting.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Last Day of Summer
programme.desc: Candace uses the last day of summer to bust her brothers, but things go out of control with Doofenshmirtz's Do-Over-Inator.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: The Final Hand!
programme.desc: In the Bey Carnival semifinals, Dante clashes with Joe while Fumiya goes up against Lodin; the battles have never been wilder and the stakes have never been higher!

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Magnificent Few/ S'winter
programme.desc: As cowboys, Phineas and Ferb drive a herd of cattle across the badlands. Dad shows the boys how to make snow cones with a machine.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Oxford
programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Brownsville
programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Fort Benning
programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Birmingham
programme.desc: Greek natives and their kin built the Birmingham restaurant scene, from barbecue joints to hotdog stands to steakhouses. Bright Star, founded in 1907, is the old guard and Johnny's is the new guard Greek restaurant. This is what the future looks like.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Athens
programme.desc: Pablo Rivadeneyra rotisserie-cooks lime-marinated chicken in Norwood. Across the street at Scott's BBQ, Larry and Betty Jean Scott work a smoke-belching pit. In these two places, we get a glimpse of the hard work that defines life in the south.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Nashville
programme.desc: One meat and three vegetables is the formula for a typical farmhand meal, translated in the mid-twentieth century to steam table cafes. In Nashville, the differences between Black and White cooking come into focus, and we discover that there are few.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Shreveport
programme.desc: Shreveport emerged in the mid-1800s as a lumber boomtown on the Red River. Cycles of boom and bust has defined this town. Herby K's is a 1936 vintage beer garden and fry house. Lucky Palace serves wok-fried T-bones and pork egg foo young.

programme.title: Full Court Press With Greta Van Susteren
programme.desc: A look at the impact of politics and policy on the American people.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Sex, Lies and Helicopters
programme.desc: Molly catches Carl coming out of Victoria's room late at night, leaving her questioning whether or not she will tell Mike.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: This Old Peggy
programme.desc: Mike wants Peggy to see a doctor after her bathtub falls through the ceiling.

programme.title: Living Black History
programme.desc: This special provides an overview of the National Museum of African American History and Culture Outreach's first year of operation and looks ahead to the new exhibits expected in the future.

programme.title: The Howard Theatre: A Century in Song
programme.desc: Vintage footage and photographs of this landmark are featured.

programme.title: Batwoman: Bat Girl Magic
programme.desc: Ryan deals with the challenge of living a double life. Mary is Team Ryan while Luke still has reservations. Victor Szasz is slashing through the streets and Commander Kane has The Crows trying to stop the fly of Snakebite through Gotham.

programme.title: Charmed: An Incovenient Truth
programme.desc: The Charmed Ones' lives are in jeopardy as The Faction closes in. Macy and Harry struggle to define their relationship.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Apology
programme.desc: Jerry is disturbed by his girlfriend's penchant for walking around the apartment naked. George looks forward to an apology from a friend who is going through the AA program. Kramer tries to maximize his time in the shower.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Strike
programme.desc: Kramer returns to work when the strike at the bagel shop finally ends years later. Kramer is intrigued by Frank's Festivus holiday. Jerry's date seems to have a changing appearance.

programme.title: Mom: Kalamazoo and a Bad Wedge of Brie
programme.desc: Christy’s plan to win her sponsor’s approval backfires, and the ladies rush in to help after Jill’s house is broken into.

programme.title: Mom: Skippy and the Knowledge Hole
programme.desc: Christy finds it challenging to quit smoking, while Bonnie helps Tammy prepare to take the GED test.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the '80s Movie
programme.desc: Max and Caroline's plans to attract a more sophisticated clientele to their dessert bar takes a turn when Max befriends a bouncer whose team of arm wrestlers become their latest patrons. Also, Mas and Randy continue to text each other.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Godmama Drama
programme.desc: Oleg and Sophie's plan to have Max and Caroline as Barbara's godparents is derailed when Oleg's domineering mother, arrives from the Ukraine for the baby's baptism and fires Max and Caroline from their godparent duties.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Reality Check
programme.desc: Sharon and the team investigate a murder during the taping of a reality competition show pitting married couples against each other. The case has a profound effect on Sanchez, bringing back memories of his late wife.

programme.title: Monk: Mr. Monk Falls in Love
programme.desc: Monk takes on the case of a woman who confesses to murdering the Butcher of Zemenia.

programme.title: Entertainers With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Segment features Liam Neeson, Katherine Heigl and Sarah Chalke, Anthony Mackie, Gal Gadot, Bert Kreischer and Cody Rhodes, Denzel Washington, Chantel Rae, M. Night Shyamalan, Alison Brie, Topher Grace and Katy Perry.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Penny Pincher Poppa/ Beauty Is Only Skin Deep
programme.desc: Son sues father over loan; woman sues over a date.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Slow Poke Scam/ Ousted Bridesmaid
programme.desc: Car accident involves insurance fraud; friend sues over costly bridesmaid dress.

programme.title: Protection Court: He Hit Me in Front of the Kids
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola
programme.desc: Dr. Jamie LaViola discusses how improvements to your smile can make a big difference. Don't let your fear of the dentist, or being too busy, keep you away from the smile you've always wanted.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Hanging on by a Thread/ Fore!
programme.desc: Damage to car; a man is struck by a stray golf ball at a wedding reception.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Brown vs. Brown
programme.desc: A Jacksonville, FL woman claims she's owed over $20,000 in back child support and says it's time for her ex to "pay up" and stop denying their daughter.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Mangram / Mangram vs. Schools
programme.desc: While her son is dying, a Virginia woman is confronted in the hospital by a young woman claiming to be pregnant - with his child!

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Lakeshia is suing Malcolm for $5,000 for unpaid personal loans, stolen money, and defamation of character. Then, Allesonda is suing Kassie for posting an ad for a dog after payment was issued then refusing to give her the dog.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The plaintiff is suing her ex-husband’s fiancé and claims she has been harassing her and has the video to prove it. A rapper claims the defendant uploaded a song without his permission, so he’s suing for breach of contract.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Not Doing Things Right' and 'Burning Things Up.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Being Insensitive ' and ' Get Off My Property.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Bird Spiked Boyfriend/ Bailed
programme.desc: A man claims his girlfriend’s father intentionally caused him to be injured; a woman seeks reimbursement for ex-boyfriend’s bail.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Brenda says Miriam stole her money and damaged her car, but Miriam says Brenda should be looking at her Aunt for the stolen money. Then, Karoline says Jeremy conned her out of money and is suing for breach of contract.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Threesome Drama and DNA Denial
programme.desc: Rico thought he received the perfect birthday gift; a threesome. But his girlfriend, DeAngela regrets it as she believes it destroyed their relationship. They did everything they could to repair it, but now Rico is with Daysha, who is pregnant.

programme.title: Maury: Your Baby Speaks Spanish ... I'll Prove I'm Not His Dad!
programme.desc: Michael wants to be a father to Jennifer's baby but he believes that a Hispanic man is the real father. Then, Brittany dumped Cody because he cheated, but then he started to deny their two children. The DNA test will reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Trolling for True Love
programme.desc: Tori has been feeling a bit suffocated by her son’s father Tyler. He says he has good reason to be this way as he’s caught Tori texting other men.
